regions.name: 日本
regions.description: 日本是猫文化的发源地之一，招财猫的故乡。日本短尾猫是日本的代表性猫种，在日本文化中占有重要地位。

regions.name: 中国
regions.description: 中国拥有悠久的养猫历史，是许多古老猫种的发源地。狸花猫是中国唯一获得国际认证的原生态纯种猫。

regions.name: 泰国
regions.description: 泰国是暹罗猫的故乡，拥有多种珍贵的猫咪品种。泰国御猫曾是泰国王室的专属猫种。

regions.name: 缅甸
regions.description: 缅甸以培育温顺友好的缅甸猫而闻名。缅甸猫是缅甸的国宝级猫种，以其巧克力色的被毛著称。

regions.name: 新加坡
regions.description: 新加坡猫是全球最小的家猫品种之一，也被称为"口袋猫"或"阴沟猫"。

regions.name: 印度尼西亚
regions.description: 印度尼西亚拥有独特的热带猫种。拉斯猫是印尼拉斯群岛的特有猫种，非常稀有。

regions.name: 伊朗
regions.description: 伊朗（波斯）是波斯猫的发源地，以华丽的长毛猫著称。波斯猫是世界上最古老的长毛猫品种之一。

regions.name: 土耳其
regions.description: 土耳其是安哥拉猫和梵猫的故乡。土耳其安哥拉猫是最古老的长毛猫品种之一。

regions.name: 塞浦路斯
regions.description: 塞浦路斯巨猫是世界上最古老的自然品种之一，据考古发现已有9000多年历史。

regions.name: 英国
regions.description: 英国培育出了许多世界著名的猫种。英国短毛猫是最古老的猫种之一，苏格兰折耳猫也深受喜爱。

regions.name: 法国
regions.description: 法国以培育优雅的夏特尔猫而闻名。夏特尔猫是法国的国宝级猫种，有着悠久的历史。

regions.name: 德国
regions.description: 德国培育出多种独特的卷毛猫品种。德国卷毛猫是德国独有的自然突变品种。

regions.name: 俄罗斯
regions.description: 俄罗斯蓝猫是世界上最著名的猫种之一。西伯利亚森林猫则是俄罗斯最大的本土猫种。

regions.name: 挪威
regions.description: 挪威森林猫是北欧神话中的精灵猫。这种猫是挪威的国猫，有着厚实的被毛以抵御严寒。

regions.name: 芬兰
regions.description: 芬兰以拉邦卷毛猫著称。虽然拉邦卷毛猫起源于美国，但在芬兰和欧洲非常受欢迎。

regions.name: 希腊
regions.description: 希腊阿提卡猫是该国古老的本土猫种，适应地中海气候，历史悠久。

regions.name: 意大利
regions.description: 意大利拥有独特的地中海猫种。西西里短毛猫是西西里岛的本土猫种。

regions.name: 埃及
regions.description: 埃及猫被视为神圣的动物，地位崇高。在古埃及，猫被视为神明的化身，杀死猫是重罪。

regions.name: 埃塞俄比亚
regions.description: 埃塞俄比亚是阿比西尼亚猫的发源地。阿比西尼亚猫被认为是古埃及猫的后裔。

regions.name: 肯尼亚
regions.description: 肯尼亚拥有独特的索科克森林猫。索科克猫是非洲最稀有的猫种之一，生活在索科克森林中。

regions.name: 美国
regions.description: 美国培育出了多种受欢迎的猫咪品种。缅因猫、布偶猫、孟加拉豹猫等名猫都起源于美国。

regions.name: 加拿大
regions.description: 加拿大的斯芬克斯猫世界闻名。这种无毛猫虽然外表奇特，但性格极其温顺亲人。

regions.name: 墨西哥
regions.description: 墨西哥无毛猫是该国独特的猫种，据称已有上千年历史，是阿兹特克文化的一部分。

regions.name: 巴西
regions.description: 巴西短毛猫是南美洲最著名的猫种。这种猫由巴西本土的流浪猫培育而来，健康强壮。

regions.name: 澳大利亚
regions.description: 澳大利亚雾猫是一种独特的澳洲猫种。这种猫是澳大利亚本土培育的第一个猫品种。

cats.name: 日本短尾猫
cats.description: 日本短尾猫是日本的代表猫种，也是日本招财猫的原型。这种猫在日本有着上千年的历史，自古以来就深受日本人的喜爱。日本短尾猫的短尾巴是由基因突变造成的，不会影响其健康。在日本文化中，短尾猫被视为幸运的象征，招财猫的形象就是以它为原型创作的。
cats.appearance: 体型中等偏瘦，身材修长，肌肉结实。毛色多样，最著名的是三花色（白底配橘黑两色斑块），此外还有白、黑、红、虎斑等多种毛色。最显著的特征是短尾巴，通常只有2-3厘米长，呈卷曲状，像兔子尾巴。眼睛大而圆，呈椭圆形，眼瞳颜色有金色、绿色、蓝色等多种。耳朵直立，位置较高。
cats.personality: 性格活泼好动，非常友好，喜欢与人互动。聪明且好奇心强，喜欢玩耍和学习新技巧。叫声轻柔优美，被形容为像唱歌一样。对主人忠诚度高，喜欢陪伴在主人身边。适应能力强，能很好地适应家庭生活，也适合与其他宠物相处。
cats.careTips: 毛发容易打理，每周梳毛2-3次即可。短尾猫活泼好动，需要足够的运动和玩耍时间，建议提供猫爬架和玩具。注意定期修剪指甲和清洁耳朵。饮食方面要注意营养均衡，避免过度喂食导致肥胖。
cats.descriptionEn: The Japanese Bobtail is Japan's representative cat breed and the prototype of the Maneki-neko (beckoning cat). This breed has a history of thousands of years in Japan and has been beloved by Japanese people since ancient times. The short tail is caused by a genetic mutation and does not affect health. In Japanese culture, the bobtail cat is considered a symbol of good luck, and the Maneki-neko figurine was created based on its image.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium-sized and lean body, with a slender and muscular build. Coat colors are diverse, most famously the calico pattern (white base with orange and black patches), also including white, black, red, and tabby. The most distinctive feature is the short tail, typically only 2-3 cm long, curled like a rabbit's tail. Eyes are large and round, oval-shaped, with various pupil colors including gold, green, and blue. Ears are erect and set high.
cats.personalityEn: Active and energetic, very friendly and enjoys interacting with people. Intelligent and curious, likes to play and learn new tricks. Has a soft and beautiful voice, described as singing-like. Highly loyal to their owners, likes to accompany them. Adaptable and integrates well into family life, also gets along with other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing 2-3 times weekly is sufficient. Bobtails are active and need enough exercise and playtime, cat trees and toys are recommended. Regular nail trimming and ear cleaning. Pay attention to balanced nutrition and avoid overfeeding to prevent obesity.

cats.name: 狸花猫
cats.description: 狸花猫是中国唯一获得国际猫协（CFA）认证的原生态纯种猫，也是中国本土最具代表性的猫种。狸花猫有着悠久的历史，在中国古代就有记载。它们是自然演化形成的品种，不是人工培育的，因此体质非常健康，适应能力极强。狸花猫在中国民间非常受欢迎，是许多家庭的捕鼠能手。
cats.appearance: 被毛呈虎斑纹状，底色为黄褐色，上面有清晰的黑色条纹。体格健壮，肌肉发达，体型中等偏长。头部呈六角形，眼睛通常为黄绿色，呈杏仁状，表情警觉聪明。耳朵大小适中，直立。爪子有力，适合攀爬和捕猎。
cats.personality: 独立而忠诚，聪明且有野性本能。捕鼠能力超强，是出色的猎手。对主人忠诚度高，一旦认定主人就会非常粘人。性格活泼好动，喜欢探索和玩耍。对陌生人保持警惕，但与熟悉的人非常亲近。适应能力强，能适应各种环境。
cats.careTips: 适应能力强，不挑食，容易饲养。定期体检和驱虫即可。给予足够的活动空间，最好能有猫爬架供其攀爬。狸花猫性格独立，不需要时刻陪伴，但也需要主人的关注和互动。被毛短而密，每周梳毛一次即可。
cats.descriptionEn: The Dragon Li is the only native purebred cat recognized by the Cat Fanciers' Association (CFA) in China, and is the most representative Chinese domestic breed. Dragon Li has a long history, with records dating back to ancient China. They are naturally evolved rather than artificially bred, making them extremely healthy with excellent adaptability. Dragon Li is very popular among Chinese families as excellent mousers.
cats.appearanceEn: Coat exhibits tabby markings with a yellowish-brown base and clear black stripes. Strong and muscular build, medium to long body. Hexagonal-shaped head with typically yellow-green almond-shaped eyes, giving an alert and intelligent expression. Medium-sized erect ears. Strong paws suitable for climbing and hunting.
cats.personalityEn: Independent yet loyal, intelligent with wild instincts. Exceptional mousing ability, excellent hunters. Highly loyal to owners, become very attached once they recognize their owner. Active and playful, loves exploring and playing. Wary of strangers but very close to familiar people. Strong adaptability to various environments.
cats.careTipsEn: Strong adaptability, not picky eaters, easy to care for. Regular checkups and deworming are sufficient. Provide enough activity space, preferably a cat tree for climbing. Dragon Li is independent but still needs owner's attention and interaction. Short dense coat, brushing once a week is sufficient.

cats.name: 临清狮猫
cats.description: 临清狮猫，又称山东狮子猫，是中国山东省临清市的著名本土猫种，已有数百年历史。这种猫因颈部一圈蓬松的鬃毛而得名，看起来像一只小狮子。临清狮猫在明清时期就已闻名，曾是宫廷贡品，被誉为中国本土最美的长毛猫。其中以鸳鸯眼（一只蓝眼一只黄眼）的品种最为珍贵，极为稀有。
cats.appearance: 最显著特征是颈部一圈蓬松的鬃毛，像狮子的鬃毛一样。体型中等偏胖，身体圆润。被毛长而柔软，白色为主，也有其他颜色的品种。眼睛通常为蓝色或一蓝一黄（鸳鸯眼），非常美丽。耳朵小而直立，有长饰毛。尾巴蓬松如扫帚。
cats.personality: 性格温顺友好，对人亲近。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍和互动。聪明且好奇，喜欢探索新环境。对主人感情深厚，喜欢陪伴。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。叫声轻柔，不会过于吵闹。
cats.careTips: 需要定期梳理长毛以防打结，建议每天梳毛一次。眼睛需要特别注意清洁，尤其是白色被毛的猫容易有泪痕。保持室内环境整洁，避免被毛沾染灰尘。注意饮食营养，定期体检。换毛季节需要增加梳毛频率，帮助梳理浮毛。
cats.descriptionEn: The Lionhead Cat, also known as Shandong Lionhead, is a famous native cat breed from Linqing City, Shandong Province, China, with a history of several hundred years. This cat is named for its fluffy mane around the neck, looking like a little lion. Lionhead cats were famous during the Ming and Qing dynasties and were tribute items for the imperial palace, praised as the most beautiful long-haired cat native to China. The odd-eyed variety (one blue eye, one yellow eye) is the most precious and extremely rare.
cats.appearanceEn: The most distinctive feature is the fluffy mane around the neck, like a lion's mane. Medium-sized, slightly chubby body with a rounded shape. Long, soft fur, predominantly white, though other color varieties exist. Eyes are usually blue or one blue one yellow (odd-eyed), very beautiful. Small, erect ears with long furnishings. Fluffy tail like a broom.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle and friendly temperament, close to people. Active and playful, enjoys interaction. Intelligent and curious, likes exploring new environments. Deeply attached to owners, enjoys accompanying them. Gets along well with children and other pets. Soft voice, not overly noisy.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing of long fur to prevent matting, daily brushing is recommended. Eyes need special attention for cleaning, especially white-furred cats prone to tear stains. Keep indoor environment clean to avoid fur getting dusty. Pay attention to nutrition and regular checkups. Increase brushing frequency during shedding seasons to remove loose fur.

cats.name: 简州猫
cats.description: 简州猫，又称四川简州猫，是中国四川省简阳市的本土猫种，以捕鼠能力强著称。简州猫在古代就非常有名，曾是皇室贡品。明清时期，简州猫与北京狮子猫、河南狸花猫并称为中国三大名猫。简州猫最独特的地方是耳朵，据说每只耳朵都有一个小缺口，形似四耳。
cats.appearance: 体型健壮，肌肉发达，身体匀称。被毛短而密实，毛色多样，多为虎斑纹或纯色，毛色鲜艳。眼睛明亮有神，多为黄绿色。耳朵直立且大，据说耳朵有缺口，形似四耳，这是简州猫的标志性特征。四肢强壮有力，动作敏捷。
cats.personality: 性格独立，捕猎能力强，是天生的捕鼠高手。对主人忠诚，能与主人建立深厚的感情。适应农村和城市生活，适应能力强。活泼好动，喜欢户外活动。警觉性高，对陌生人保持警惕。
cats.careTips: 基本护理即可，适应能力强。给予足够活动空间，如果是农村散养需注意安全。定期驱虫和体检。被毛短，每周梳毛一次即可。简州猫活动量大，需要充足的食物供应。注意保持饮水清洁。
cats.descriptionEn: The Jianzhou Cat, also known as Sichuan Jianzhou Cat, is a native cat breed from Jianyang City, Sichuan Province, China, renowned for its excellent mousing ability. Jianzhou cats were very famous in ancient times and were used as tribute items for royalty. During the Ming and Qing dynasties, Jianzhou cats, Beijing Lionhead cats, and Henan Dragon Li cats were known as China's three famous cats. The most unique feature of the Jianzhou cat is its ears - it's said that each ear has a small notch, giving the appearance of four ears.
cats.appearanceEn: Strong and muscular body, well-proportioned. Short, dense coat with diverse colors, mostly tabby or solid colors with bright colors. Bright and expressive eyes, mostly yellow-green. Large erect ears, said to have notches making them appear like four ears - this is the signature feature of Jianzhou cats. Strong limbs with agile movements.
cats.personalityEn: Independent character with excellent hunting skills, natural mouse-catching experts. Loyal to owners, can form deep bonds. Adaptable to both rural and urban life. Active and playful, enjoys outdoor activities. Highly alert, wary of strangers.
cats.careTipsEn: Basic care is sufficient, strong adaptability. Provide enough activity space, be careful with safety if allowed outdoor access in rural areas. Regular deworming and checkups. Short coat, brushing once a week is sufficient. Jianzhou cats are active and need sufficient food supply. Keep water clean.

cats.name: 中国田园猫
cats.description: 中国田园猫是中国本土家猫的统称，也就是俗称的土猫。它们不是一个特定的品种，而是中国本土所有混血家猫的总称。中国田园猫有着悠久的历史，几千年来一直陪伴着中国人。常见的有狸花猫、橘猫、奶牛猫、三花猫、玄猫（纯黑色）、白猫等多种花色。田园猫因为是自然选择的结果，体质非常健康，适应能力强。
cats.appearance: 体型多样，毛色和花纹丰富多变。常见的花色有橘猫（橘色虎斑）、奶牛猫（黑白）、三花猫（白橘黑）、狸花猫（虎斑）、玄猫（纯黑）、白猫、玳瑁猫等。眼睛颜色各异，有黄色、绿色、蓝色等。身体健壮，肌肉发达。
cats.personality: 性格因个体而异，通常活泼健康。适应力强，容易饲养。聪明机灵，生存能力强。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。不同花色的田园猫性格也有所不同，橘猫通常比较温顺亲人，奶牛猫比较活泼好动。
cats.careTips: 基本护理即可，定期体检和驱虫。给予足够的活动空间和互动。田园猫体质好，不容易生病，但也要注意科学喂养。被毛短，容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。注意控制体重，尤其是橘猫容易发胖。
cats.descriptionEn: The Chinese Domestic cat is a general term for native Chinese house cats, commonly known as "土猫" (native cats). They are not a specific breed but rather the collective name for all mixed-breed domestic cats in China. Chinese domestic cats have a long history, accompanying Chinese people for thousands of years. Common varieties include Dragon Li, orange cats, cow cats, calico cats, black cats (pure black), white cats, and tortoiseshell cats. Due to natural selection, domestic cats are very healthy with strong adaptability.
cats.appearanceEn: Varied body types with diverse coat colors and patterns. Common patterns include orange tabby, black and white (cow cat), calico (white, orange and black), tabby, solid black, white, and tortoiseshell. Eye colors vary including yellow, green, and blue. Strong and muscular body.
cats.personalityEn: Temperament varies by individual, usually lively and healthy. Strong adaptability, easy to care for. Intelligent and resourceful with excellent survival skills. Loyal to owners with rich emotions. Different coat colors have different personalities - orange cats are usually gentler and more affectionate, while cow cats tend to be more active and playful.
cats.careTipsEn: Basic care is sufficient, regular checkups and deworming. Provide enough activity space and interaction. Domestic cats are healthy and not prone to illness, but still need proper feeding. Short coat is easy to care for, brushing once a week is sufficient. Monitor weight, especially as orange cats are prone to obesity.

cats.name: 传统暹罗猫
cats.description: 传统暹罗猫，又称苹果头暹罗猫，是暹罗猫的原始形态，在泰国已有数百年历史。传统暹罗猫比现代暹罗猫体型更圆润，脸部也更圆，看起来更憨厚可爱。在泰国，暹罗猫被称为"月亮钻石"，是非常珍贵的品种，曾只有皇室和寺庙才能饲养。
cats.appearance: 体型较圆润，不像现代暹罗猫那样修长。头部呈圆形，因此被称为苹果头。被毛短而光滑，重点色分布在耳朵、脸部、四肢和尾巴。底色通常为米黄色或奶油色，重点色有海豹色、巧克力色、蓝色、丁香色等。眼睛为蓝色杏仁状，非常美丽。
cats.personality: 性格温和友善，忠诚度高。喜欢与人互动，对主人感情深厚。比现代暹罗猫稍微安静一些，但同样活泼好动。叫声轻柔，不会过于吵闹。聪明好奇，喜欢探索。适应能力强，适合家庭饲养。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。注意控制饮食，避免肥胖。暹罗猫怕冷，冬天要注意保暖。需要主人的陪伴和互动，不能长时间独处。定期检查牙齿和耳朵健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Traditional Siamese, also known as the Applehead Siamese, is the original form of the Siamese with a history of several hundred years in Thailand. Traditional Siamese are rounder and have a more circular face than modern Siamese, looking cuter and more honest. In Thailand, Siamese cats are called "Diamond of the Moon" and were very precious, only kept by royalty and temples.
cats.appearanceEn: Rounder body compared to the modern Siamese, not as slender. Round head, hence called Applehead. Short, smooth coat with color points on ears, face, paws and tail. Base color is usually beige or cream with point colors including seal, chocolate, blue, and lilac. Beautiful blue almond-shaped eyes.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle and friendly temperament with high loyalty. Enjoys interacting with people and forms deep bonds with owners. Somewhat quieter than modern Siamese but equally active. Soft voice, not overly noisy. Intelligent and curious, likes exploring. Strong adaptability, suitable for family living.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Watch diet to avoid obesity. Siamese cats are sensitive to cold, keep warm in winter. Needs owner's companionship and interaction, cannot be left alone for long periods. Regular dental and ear checkups.

cats.name: 现代暹罗猫
cats.description: 现代暹罗猫是经过育种改良后的暹罗猫品种，以其修长优雅的外表著称，是世界上最著名的宠物猫品种之一。现代暹罗猫是20世纪在英国和美国培育出来的，通过选择性育种使其体型更加修长。暹罗猫是最早被认可的东方猫种，在全球范围内都非常受欢迎。
cats.appearance: 体型修长优雅，呈管状身材，四肢细长。头部呈楔形（三角形），耳朵大而直立，位置较低。被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体，重点色分布在耳朵、脸部、四肢和尾巴。眼睛为深蓝色，呈杏仁状，非常迷人。
cats.personality: 极其聪明、好奇、社交性强。喜欢与人互动，对主人忠诚，喜欢跟随主人到处走。话痨，叫声响亮且有独特的声音，被形容为像婴儿啼哭。活泼好动，精力充沛。对主人的情绪非常敏感，能感知主人的心情。
cats.careTips: 被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。需要大量互动和关注，不能长时间独处。暹罗猫好奇心强，要注意家里的安全。因为体型瘦长，要注意保暖。定期体检，注意口腔健康和肾脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Modern Siamese is a selectively bred variety of Siamese cat, renowned for its slender and elegant appearance, making it one of the world's most famous pet cat breeds. Modern Siamese were developed in the UK and USA in the 20th century through selective breeding to achieve a more slender body. Siamese was the first recognized Oriental cat breed and remains popular worldwide.
cats.appearanceEn: Slender and elegant body with tubular shape and long slender legs. Wedge-shaped (triangular) head with large erect ears set low. Short, smooth coat lying close to the body with color points on ears, face, paws and tail. Deep blue almond-shaped eyes, very captivating.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely intelligent, curious, and highly social. Enjoys interacting with people, loyal to owners, likes to follow owners around. Talkative with a loud, distinctive voice described as sounding like a baby crying. Active and energetic. Very sensitive to owner's emotions, can sense their mood.
cats.careTipsEn: Short coat is easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Needs lots of interaction and attention, cannot be left alone for long. Siamese are curious, pay attention to home safety. Due to slender body, keep warm. Regular checkups, watch dental and kidney health.

cats.name: 柯拉特猫
cats.description: 柯拉特猫是泰国国宝级猫种，在泰国被称为"Si-Sawat"（好运猫），被视为幸运和繁荣的象征。柯拉特猫是一种非常古老的品种，在泰国古籍《猫诗册》中就有记载，已有数百年历史。在泰国传统中，柯拉特猫常被作为婚礼礼物送给新娘，象征着幸福和好运。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而密实，呈独特的银蓝色，在光线下会闪闪发光，像绸缎一样。头部长而呈心形（从正面看），这是柯拉特猫的标志性特征。眼睛大而圆，呈醒目的绿色，像两颗绿宝石。体型中等，肌肉发达，身体结实。
cats.personality: 性格聪明、活跃、忠诚。对主人感情深厚，喜欢与人互动。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍和探索。适应能力较强，但更适合熟悉的环境。对陌生人比较警惕，需要时间来接受新人。记忆力好，学习能力强。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周一至两次梳毛即可。喜欢有人陪伴，不适合长时间独处。柯拉特猫非常聪明，需要智力刺激，可以提供益智玩具。定期体检，注意口腔健康。注意饮食均衡，避免过度喂食。
cats.descriptionEn: The Korat is a precious Thai cat breed, called "Si-Sawat" (Good Luck Cat) in Thailand, regarded as a symbol of luck and prosperity. Korat is a very ancient breed, documented in ancient Thai poetry "Cat Poems" with a history of several hundred years. In Thai tradition, Korats are often given as wedding gifts to brides, symbolizing happiness and good fortune.
cats.appearanceEn: Short, dense coat in unique silver-blue that shines in light, like satin. Heart-shaped head (from front view), this is the signature feature of Korat. Large round eyes in striking green, like two emeralds. Medium body with developed muscles, sturdy build.
cats.personalityEn: Intelligent, active, and loyal. Forms deep bonds with owners, enjoys interacting. Active and playful, loves playing and exploring. Strong adaptability but prefers familiar environments. Wary of strangers, needs time to accept new people. Good memory with strong learning ability.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once or twice a week is sufficient. Likes companionship, not suitable for being left alone long. Korats are very intelligent and need mental stimulation, provide puzzle toys. Regular checkups, watch dental health. Balanced diet, avoid overfeeding.

cats.name: 泰国御猫
cats.description: 泰国御猫，又称泰国白宝石猫，是泰国王室专属的稀有猫种。"Khao Manee"在泰语中意为"白色宝石"。这种猫在泰国历史悠久，在古书中就有记载。由于极其珍贵，历史上只有泰国王室成员才能拥有，普通百姓难以见到。泰国御猫最珍贵的是鸳鸯眼（一只蓝色一只金色），被视为极品。
cats.appearance: 全身纯白被毛，短而光滑有光泽。体型中等，身体匀称修长。最显著的特征是眼睛，最好的是鸳鸯眼（一只蓝色，一只金色或绿色），也有两只都是蓝色或都是金色的。耳朵大而直立，位置较高。脸型呈楔形，线条优美。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、聪明、亲人。喜欢与人互动，对家庭成员友好。好奇好动，喜欢玩耍和探索。对主人忠诚，喜欢跟随主人。适应能力强，能很好地适应家庭生活。聪明伶俐，学习能力强，可以学会各种技巧。
cats.careTips: 纯白被毛需要定期清洁，保持洁白。眼睛需要特别注意护理，尤其是鸳鸯眼的个体可能有听力问题。定期清洁耳朵和牙齿。泰国御猫活泼好动，需要足够的活动空间和玩具。注意防晒，白色猫咪容易被晒伤。
cats.descriptionEn: The Khao Manee, also known as the Thai White Gem, is a rare cat breed exclusive to the Thai royal family. "Khao Manee" means "White Gem" in Thai. This breed has a long history in Thailand, documented in ancient texts. Due to its extreme rarity, only Thai royal family members could own them historically, common people rarely saw them. The most precious Khao Manee have odd eyes (one blue, one gold), considered极品 (the ultimate).
cats.appearanceEn: Pure white coat all over, short, smooth and glossy. Medium body, well-proportioned and slender. Most distinctive feature is the eyes - the best are odd eyes (one blue, one gold or green), also available with both eyes blue or both gold. Large erect ears set high. Wedge-shaped face with beautiful lines.
cats.personalityEn: Active, intelligent, and affectionate. Enjoys interacting with people, friendly to family members. Curious and playful, loves playing and exploring. Loyal to owners, likes following them around. Strong adaptability, integrates well into family life. Clever with strong learning ability, can learn various tricks.
cats.careTipsEn: Pure white coat needs regular cleaning to keep it white. Eyes need special care, odd-eyed individuals may have hearing issues. Regular ear and teeth cleaning. Khao Manee are active and need enough activity space and toys. Sun protection is important, white cats are prone to sunburn.

cats.name: 泰国猫
cats.description: 泰国猫，又称Thai Cat，是泰国本土的传统猫种，被认为是暹罗猫的祖先品种。泰国猫保持了暹罗猫最原始的形态，体型更加圆润自然。在泰国，这种猫是非常常见的本土家猫，适应了当地的气候和环境。泰国猫虽然不如现代暹罗猫有名，但保留了最原始的品种特征。
cats.appearance: 体型中等圆润，不像现代暹罗猫那样极端修长。头部呈楔形但较圆润。被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体。眼睛为蓝色杏仁状，非常美丽。毛色通常是重点色，有海豹色、巧克力色等多种。
cats.personality: 性格温和友善，适应力强。喜欢与人互动，对儿童友好。活泼好动，但不会过度活跃。聪明好奇，喜欢探索新事物。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。容易训练，可以学会一些简单的指令。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。提供足够互动和玩耍时间。注意保暖，短毛猫冬天怕冷。定期体检，注意牙齿和肾脏健康。饮食均衡，避免肥胖。
cats.descriptionEn: The Thai, also known as Thai Cat, is a traditional native cat breed of Thailand, considered the ancestral breed of the Siamese. Thai cats retain the most original form of the Siamese with a more rounded and natural body shape. In Thailand, this cat is a very common native house cat, adapted to the local climate and environment. While not as famous as the modern Siamese, Thai cats retain the most original breed characteristics.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium-sized and rounded body, not as extremely slender as the modern Siamese. Wedge-shaped but more rounded head. Short, smooth coat lying close to the body. Beautiful blue almond-shaped eyes. Coat colors are usually pointed, including seal, chocolate and various others.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle and friendly temperament with strong adaptability. Enjoys interacting with people, friendly to children. Active and playful but not overly energetic. Intelligent and curious, likes exploring new things. Loyal to owners with rich emotions. Easy to train, can learn simple commands.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Provide enough interaction and playtime. Keep warm, short-haired cats are sensitive to cold in winter. Regular checkups, watch dental and kidney health. Balanced diet, avoid obesity.

cats.name: 缅甸猫
cats.description: 缅甸猫是缅甸的国宝级猫种，在缅甸有着悠久的历史，甚至被认为是神圣的猫。缅甸猫最早来自缅甸的寺庙，由僧侣饲养。20世纪初被引入美国和英国，经过培育发展成现在的品种。缅甸猫以其友善外向的性格著称，被称为"猫中之狗"，因为它们像狗一样忠诚亲人。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而密实，呈独特的光泽感，像绸缎一样。最经典的颜色是深褐色（貂色或香槟色），也有蓝色、香槟色、铂金色等多种颜色。眼睛呈金色或琥珀色，大而圆，非常迷人。体型中等，但肌肉发达，比看起来重很多，有"砖头裹在丝绸里"的说法。
cats.personality: 性格极其友善、亲人、活泼。被称为"猫中之狗"，喜欢与人互动，对主人非常忠诚。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍，即使成年后也保持着幼猫般的活力。聪明好奇，学习能力强，可以学会捡东西等技能。适应能力强，适合家庭饲养。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可，定期擦拭可增加光泽。喜欢有人陪伴，不适合长时间独处。缅甸猫食欲好，容易发胖，要注意控制饮食。活泼好动，需要足够的活动空间和玩具。定期体检，注意口腔和心脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Burmese is a national treasure cat breed of Myanmar with a long history, even considered sacred. Burmese cats originated from temples in Myanmar, raised by monks. Introduced to the USA and UK in the early 20th century, they were developed into the current breed. Burmese cats are renowned for their friendly and outgoing personality, called "dogs of the cat world" because they are as loyal and affectionate as dogs.
cats.appearanceEn: Short, dense coat with unique glossy sheen, like satin. The classic color is dark brown (sable or champagne), also available in blue, champagne, platinum and other colors. Gold or amber eyes, large and round, very captivating. Medium body but muscular, weighs more than it looks, described as "a brick wrapped in silk".
cats.personalityEn: Extremely friendly, affectionate and active. Called "dogs of the cat world", enjoys interacting with people, very loyal to owners. Active and playful, enjoys playing, retaining kitten-like energy even as adults. Intelligent and curious with strong learning ability, can learn tricks like fetching. Strong adaptability, suitable for family living.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient, regular wiping can increase shine. Likes companionship, not suitable for being left alone long. Good appetite, prone to obesity, watch diet. Active and playful, needs enough activity space and toys. Regular checkups, watch dental and heart health.

cats.name: 欧式缅甸猫
cats.description: 欧式缅甸猫是在英国培育的缅甸猫品种，与美式缅甸猫有所不同。20世纪中期，缅甸猫从美国引入英国后，英国的育种者按照自己的标准进行了选择性培育，形成了欧式缅甸猫。欧式缅甸猫比美式缅甸猫体型更修长，脸型也更有棱角，颜色种类更多。
cats.appearance: 体型比美式缅甸猫更修长优雅，肌肉仍然发达但线条更流畅。头部更呈楔形，没有美式缅甸猫那么圆润。被毛短而有光泽，颜色比美式缅甸猫更多样，包括红色、奶油色、玳瑁色等多种颜色。眼睛呈金色或黄绿色。
cats.personality: 性格友好、聪明、活泼。喜欢与人互动，适应力强。比美式缅甸猫稍微活跃一些，但同样亲人。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍和探索。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。提供足够活动空间和玩具。注意饮食控制，避免肥胖。定期体检，注意牙齿健康。欧式缅甸猫社交性强，适合有其他宠物的家庭。
cats.descriptionEn: The European Burmese is a Burmese breed developed in the UK, different from the American Burmese. In the mid-20th century, after Burmese cats were introduced from the USA to the UK, British breeders selectively bred them according to their own standards, forming the European Burmese. European Burmese are more slender and elegant than American Burmese, with more angular faces and more color varieties.
cats.appearanceEn: More slender and elegant body than American Burmese, still muscular but with smoother lines. More wedge-shaped head, not as round as American Burmese. Short, glossy coat with more color varieties than American Burmese, including red, cream, tortoiseshell and other colors. Gold or yellow-green eyes.
cats.personalityEn: Friendly, intelligent and active. Enjoys interacting with people with strong adaptability. Somewhat more active than American Burmese but equally affectionate. Intelligent and curious, likes playing and exploring. Loyal to owners with rich emotions.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Provide enough activity space and toys. Watch diet to avoid obesity. Regular checkups, watch dental health. European Burmese are highly social, suitable for families with other pets.

cats.name: 波米拉猫
cats.description: 波米拉猫是缅甸猫与波斯猫（金吉拉）的杂交品种，1981年诞生于英国。这个品种的诞生完全是意外——一只缅甸猫和一只金吉拉波斯猫偶然交配，生下的小猫非常漂亮，于是被正式培育成新品种。波米拉猫结合了缅甸猫的活泼和波斯猫的安静，性格非常理想。
cats.appearance: 被毛中等长度，柔软而有光泽。最经典的是银色底毛配渐变色的毛尖（银色渐层），看起来闪闪发光。眼睛大而圆，呈绿色或蓝绿色，非常美丽。体型中等，身体匀称，肌肉结实。脸型圆润，鼻子短。
cats.personality: 性格温和友善，继承了波斯猫的安静和缅甸猫的活泼，性格平衡完美。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍，但不过度活跃。对人亲近，喜欢陪伴主人。适应能力强，适合各种家庭环境。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次，以防打结。眼睛和耳朵需要定期清洁。波米拉猫性格温和，适合室内饲养。注意饮食均衡，避免过度喂食。定期体检，注意眼部健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Burmilla is a crossbreed between Burmese and Persian (Chinchilla) cats, born in the UK in 1981. The breed's creation was completely accidental - a Burmese and a Chinchilla Persian cat accidentally mated, and the kittens were so beautiful they were officially developed into a new breed. Burmilla combines the playfulness of Burmese with the calmness of Persians, having a very ideal temperament.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium-length coat, soft and glossy. Most classic is silver base with tipped hairs (silver shaded), looking sparkling. Large round eyes in green or blue-green, very beautiful. Medium body, well-proportioned with muscular build. Round face with short nose.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle and friendly temperament, inheriting the calmness of Persians and playfulness of Burmese, with perfectly balanced personality. Intelligent and curious, likes playing but not overly active. Affectionate towards people, enjoys accompanying owners. Strong adaptability, suitable for various household environments.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week to prevent matting. Eyes and ears need regular cleaning. Burmilla's gentle temperament makes them suitable for indoor living. Watch diet to avoid overfeeding. Regular checkups, watch eye health.

cats.name: 新加坡猫
cats.description: 新加坡猫，又称狮城猫，是全球公认的体型最小的家猫品种，成年母猫体重仅1.5-2公斤，公猫2-3公斤，因此被称为"口袋猫"。新加坡猫起源于新加坡，最初是生活在新加坡街头和排水沟里的流浪猫，被称为"阴沟猫"。20世纪70年代被一位美国人发现并带回美国培育，后来成为正式品种。
cats.appearance: 体型极小，是世界上最小的家猫品种。被毛短而光滑，底色为象牙白或浅米色，上面有深褐色的虎斑纹（毛尖色）。眼睛大而明亮，呈杏仁状，颜色为绿色或金黄色。耳朵大而直立，位置较宽。四肢纤细，尾巴长度中等。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、好奇、亲人。虽然体型小，但精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。对主人忠诚，喜欢跟随主人到处走。聪明机灵，学习能力强。适应能力强，适合公寓饲养。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。需要温暖的环境，体型小容易怕冷。新加坡猫活泼好动，需要足够的玩具和互动空间。因为体型小，要注意安全，避免被踩到或摔到。定期体检，注意口腔健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Singapura, also known as the Lion City Cat, is globally recognized as the smallest domestic cat breed, with adult females weighing only 1.5-2 kg and males 2-3 kg, hence called "pocket cat". Singapura originated from Singapore, initially living as stray cats on Singapore streets and in drains, called "drain cats". In the 1970s, an American discovered them and brought them to the USA for breeding, later becoming an official breed.
cats.appearanceEn: Extremely small body, the world's smallest domestic cat breed. Short, smooth coat with ivory or light beige base color with dark brown ticked markings. Large, bright almond-shaped eyes in green or golden yellow. Large erect ears set wide apart. Slender legs, medium-length tail.
cats.personalityEn: Active, curious and affectionate. Despite small size, full of energy, loves playing and exploring. Loyal to owners, likes following them around. Intelligent and clever with strong learning ability. Strong adaptability, suitable for apartment living. Gets along well with children and other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Needs warm environment, small size makes them prone to cold. Singapura are active and need enough toys and interaction space. Due to small size, pay attention to safety, avoid being stepped on or falling. Regular checkups, watch dental health.

cats.name: 拉斯猫
cats.description: 拉斯猫，又称拉斯岛猫，是印度尼西亚拉斯群岛（Raas Islands）的特有猫种，属于非常稀有的本土猫种。拉斯猫是在拉斯岛上自然演化形成的，长期与外界隔绝，因此保留了独特的品种特征。这种猫在印尼之外非常罕见，国际上对其了解也不多。
cats.appearance: 体型中等，身体匀称，肌肉发达。被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体。毛色多样，通常为灰色、蓝色系或虎斑色，也有其他颜色。眼睛形状优美，颜色多为黄绿色或金色。耳朵直立，大小适中。
cats.personality: 性格独立，适应力强。喜欢热带环境，对主人忠诚。保留了一定的野性本能，警觉性高。聪明机灵，反应敏捷。与熟悉的人亲近，对陌生人保持警惕。
cats.careTips: 适应热带气候，基本护理即可。定期体检和驱虫。被毛短，容易打理。提供足够的活动空间和玩具。注意防暑降温，保持室内通风。
cats.descriptionEn: The Raas, also known as the Raas Island Cat, is a unique cat breed native to the Raas Islands in Indonesia, belonging to a very rare native breed. Raas cats evolved naturally on Raas Island, isolated from the outside world for a long time, thus retaining unique breed characteristics. This cat is very rare outside Indonesia, and not much is known internationally.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium body, well-proportioned with muscular build. Short, smooth coat lying close to the body. Diverse coat colors, usually gray, blue series or tabby, also other colors. Beautiful eye shape, mostly yellow-green or gold. Erect ears of moderate size.
cats.personalityEn: Independent with strong adaptability. Enjoys tropical environment, loyal to owners. Retains some wild instincts, highly alert. Intelligent and clever with quick reflexes. Close to familiar people, wary of strangers.
cats.careTipsEn: Adapted to tropical climate, basic care is sufficient. Regular checkups and deworming. Short coat, easy to groom. Provide enough activity space and toys. Pay attention to cooling down in summer, keep indoor ventilation.

cats.name: 波斯猫
cats.description: 波斯猫是世界上最古老、最著名的长毛猫品种之一，起源于古波斯（今伊朗）。17世纪时，波斯猫通过商队从波斯传入欧洲，立即受到欧洲贵族的喜爱，成为身份和地位的象征。波斯猫以其华丽的长毛、扁平的脸和温柔的性格著称，被誉为"猫中王子"。波斯猫是全球最受欢迎的猫种之一，长期位居最受欢迎猫种排行榜前列。
cats.appearance: 体型圆胖，身材矮壮，躯干短。被毛长而华丽，浓密柔软，毛色极其多样，有单色、渐变色、烟色、斑纹等近百种毛色。头部圆而大，脸扁平，鼻子短而凹（俗称"扁脸"）。眼睛大而圆，颜色有蓝色、绿色、金色、铜色等多种。耳朵小而圆，位置较低。
cats.personality: 性格安静、温柔、友善，是典型的室内猫。波斯猫举止优雅，不会过于活跃，喜欢安静的环境。对主人忠诚，喜欢被抚摸和拥抱。不太喜欢攀爬和跳跃，更喜欢躺在柔软的地方。适应室内生活，不适合放养。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要每天梳理以防打结，最好早晚各梳一次。眼睛和鼻子需要特别护理，因为扁平的脸容易导致泪溢和呼吸问题。定期清洁耳朵。波斯猫安静，不需要大量运动，但也需要适当的互动。定期体检，注意肾脏和呼吸道健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Persian is one of the oldest and most famous long-haired cat breeds in the world, originating from ancient Persia (modern-day Iran). In the 17th century, Persians were brought to Europe via trade caravans and immediately became favorites of European nobility, becoming a symbol of status and prestige. Persians are renowned for their luxurious long coat, flat face and gentle temperament, called the "Prince of Cats". Persians are one of the most popular cat breeds globally, consistently ranking at the top of most loved cat breed lists.
cats.appearanceEn: Round and chunky body, short and stocky with short torso. Long, luxurious coat that is thick and soft, extremely diverse in color with nearly 100 varieties including solid, shaded, smoke, and tabby patterns. Large round head with flat face and short indented nose (commonly called "flat-faced"). Large round eyes in blue, green, gold, copper and other colors. Small round ears set low.
cats.personalityEn: Quiet, gentle and friendly temperament, a typical indoor cat. Persians behave elegantly, not overly active, prefer quiet environments. Loyal to owners, enjoy being petted and hugged. Not fond of climbing or jumping, prefer lying on soft surfaces. Adapted to indoor living, not suitable for outdoor roaming.
cats.careTipsEn: Daily brushing needed to prevent matting, best done morning and evening. Eyes and nose need special care as flat face can cause tear staining and respiratory issues. Regular ear cleaning. Persians are quiet and don't need much exercise but still need proper interaction. Regular checkups, watch kidney and respiratory health.

cats.name: 异国短毛猫
cats.description: 异国短毛猫，常被称为"加菲猫"（因为卡通形象加菲猫就是以它为原型），是波斯猫的短毛版本。异国短毛猫是20世纪60年代在美国培育出来的，通过将波斯猫与美国短毛猫交配，保留了波斯猫的外貌特征但被毛变短。这种猫因为容易打理又有波斯猫的可爱外表，受到很多人的喜爱。
cats.appearance: 体型圆胖，与波斯猫非常相似。被毛短而密实，毛绒绒的，像泰迪熊一样。毛色种类与波斯猫相同，非常多样。头部圆而大，脸扁平，鼻子短，与波斯猫一样是扁脸。眼睛大而圆，颜色多样。耳朵小而圆。
cats.personality: 性格温和友善，安静而不失活泼。比波斯猫稍微活泼一些，但仍然很安静。对人亲近，喜欢被抚摸。适应能力强，容易饲养。聪明好奇，偶尔会玩耍。叫声轻柔，很少叫。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可，比波斯猫省事很多。注意饮食控制，这种猫容易发胖。扁脸需要注意眼睛和呼吸道健康。定期清洁眼睛和耳朵。不需要大量运动，但也要有适当的活动。
cats.descriptionEn: The Exotic Shorthair, commonly called "Garfield cat" (because the cartoon Garfield is based on this breed), is the shorthaired version of the Persian. Exotic Shorthairs were developed in the USA in the 1960s by crossing Persians with American Shorthairs, retaining the Persian's appearance but with shorter coat. This breed is loved by many for being easy to groom while having the cute looks of Persians.
cats.appearanceEn: Round and chunky body, very similar to Persian. Short, dense coat that is fluffy like a teddy bear. Same wide variety of coat colors as Persian. Large round head with flat face and short nose, same flat-faced as Persian. Large round eyes in various colors. Small round ears.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle and friendly temperament, quiet but not lacking playfulness. Somewhat more active than Persian but still quite calm. Affectionate towards people, enjoys being petted. Strong adaptability, easy to care for. Intelligent and curious, occasionally plays. Soft voice, rarely meows.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient, much easier than Persian. Watch diet control as this breed gains weight easily. Flat face needs attention for eye and respiratory health. Regular eye and ear cleaning. Doesn't need much exercise but still needs some activity.

cats.name: 土耳其安哥拉猫
cats.description: 土耳其安哥拉猫是世界上最古老的长毛猫品种之一，起源于土耳其的安卡拉地区（旧称安哥拉）。这种猫有着数百年的历史，16世纪时传入欧洲，成为欧洲贵族的宠儿。土耳其安哥拉猫被认为是所有长毛猫的祖先，波斯猫等许多长毛品种都有它的血统。在土耳其，安哥拉猫受到珍视，被视为国宝。
cats.appearance: 体型修长优雅，身体纤细，线条优美。被毛长而柔软，如丝绸般光滑，没有内层绒毛，因此不像波斯猫那样蓬松。最经典的颜色是纯白色，也有其他多种颜色和图案。眼睛颜色多样，蓝色、绿色、金色都有，白色安哥拉猫常出现鸳鸯眼。耳朵大而直立，位置较高。
cats.personality: 聪明、好奇、活泼。喜欢与人互动，对主人忠诚，喜欢跟随主人。叫声优美，声音轻柔。精力充沛，喜欢攀爬和跳跃，身手敏捷。适应能力强，性格外向。容易训练，可以学会各种技巧。
cats.careTips: 需要每天梳毛以防打结，但因为没有底层绒毛，比波斯猫容易打理一些。定期清洁耳朵和眼睛。提供高处供其攀爬，安哥拉猫喜欢待在高处。注意口腔健康，定期刷牙。定期体检，注意心脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Turkish Angora is one of the oldest long-haired cat breeds in the world, originating from the Ankara region of Turkey (formerly Angora). This breed has a history of hundreds of years and was introduced to Europe in the 16th century, becoming the favorite of European nobility. Turkish Angoras are considered the ancestor of all long-haired cats, with Persians and many other long-haired breeds having Angora ancestry. In Turkey, Angora cats are treasured and considered a national treasure.
cats.appearanceEn: Slender and elegant body with refined lines and graceful build. Long, soft coat as smooth as silk, without undercoat, so not as fluffy as Persian. Most classic color is pure white, also available in many other colors and patterns. Diverse eye colors including blue, green and gold, white Angoras often have odd eyes. Large erect ears set high.
cats.personalityEn: Intelligent, curious and active. Enjoys interacting with people, loyal to owners, likes following them around. Beautiful voice with soft sounds. Full of energy, loves climbing and jumping with agile movements. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality. Easy to train, can learn various tricks.
cats.careTipsEn: Daily brushing needed to prevent matting, but easier to care for than Persian due to lack of undercoat. Regular ear and eye cleaning. Provide high places for climbing as Angoras like to be up high. Pay attention to dental health, regular teeth brushing. Regular checkups, watch heart health.

cats.name: 土耳其凡猫
cats.description: 土耳其凡猫，又称土耳其梵猫，是一种非常独特的猫种，以热爱游泳而闻名，被称为"游泳猫"。凡猫起源于土耳其东部的凡湖地区，是一种非常古老的自然品种。这种猫在土耳其被视为国宝，传说它们是从诺亚方舟上下来的猫。凡猫最独特的特点是喜欢水，甚至会主动下水游泳，这在猫中极其罕见。
cats.appearance: 大型猫种，身体长而结实，肌肉发达。身体主要为白色，头部和尾部有彩色斑块（称为"梵纹"），其他部位不应有颜色。眼睛呈椭圆形，颜色为琥珀色或蓝色，也有鸳鸯眼的个体。被毛长而柔软，只有一层，没有绒毛，因此容易打理。尾巴长而蓬松，像刷子一样。
cats.personality: 聪明、好奇、活泼好动。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。喜欢水，有些个体甚至会主动跳进水里游泳。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。适应能力强，性格外向。身手敏捷，跳跃能力强。
cats.careTips: 被毛厚实但易于打理，每周梳毛2-3次即可。提供足够的活动空间和玩具，凡猫精力旺盛。可以提供水池等玩水设施。提供高处供其攀爬跳跃。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Turkish Van, also known as the Turkish Van cat, is a very unique breed known for its love of swimming, called the "swimming cat". Van cats originated from the Lake Van region in eastern Turkey, a very ancient natural breed. This cat is considered a national treasure in Turkey, legend says they descended from Noah's Ark. The most unique trait of Van cats is their love of water, even actively swimming in it, which is extremely rare among cats.
cats.appearanceEn: Large cat breed with long, sturdy body and well-developed muscles. Body mainly white with colored markings on head and tail (called "Van markings"), no color on other parts. Oval-shaped eyes in amber or blue, also odd-eyed individuals. Long, soft coat with only one layer, no undercoat, easy to groom. Long fluffy tail like a brush.
cats.personalityEn: Intelligent, curious and very active. Full of energy, loves playing and exploring. Loves water, some individuals will even actively jump into water to swim. Loyal to owners with rich emotions. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality. Agile with strong jumping ability.
cats.careTipsEn: Thick coat but easy to groom, brushing 2-3 times a week is sufficient. Provide enough activity space and toys as Van cats are energetic. Can provide a pool or water facilities for playing. Provide high places for climbing and jumping. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health.

cats.name: 塞浦路斯巨猫
cats.description: 塞浦路斯巨猫，又称塞浦路斯猫，是世界上最古老的自然猫品种之一。考古学家在塞浦路斯岛上发现了9500年前的猫骨骼化石，证明这种猫在塞浦路斯已经生活了近万年。塞浦路斯巨猫是在塞浦路斯岛上独立演化形成的，因为长期与世隔绝，形成了独特的品种特征。
cats.appearance: 体型较大，比普通家猫大一圈，肌肉发达，身体强壮。被毛短至中等长度，质地柔软，毛色多样，最常见的是虎斑色和三花色。眼睛形状优美，颜色多为绿色、黄绿色或金黄色。耳朵直立，大小适中，有长饰毛。
cats.personality: 性格独立、友善、适应力强。保留了一定的野性本能，但对主人友好。喜欢户外活动，擅长攀爬和捕猎。对家庭成员忠诚，感情丰富。聪明机灵，学习能力强。
cats.careTips: 被毛打理相对简单，每周梳毛一次即可。提供足够活动空间，如果允许户外活动更好。定期体检和驱虫。塞浦路斯猫体质好，不容易生病。注意饮食均衡，保持适当体重。
cats.descriptionEn: The Cyprus Cat, also known as the Cypriot cat, is one of the oldest natural cat breeds in the world. Archaeologists discovered 9,500-year-old cat fossils on Cyprus, proving this cat has lived on Cyprus for nearly ten thousand years. Cyprus cats evolved independently on the island, forming unique breed characteristics due to long-term isolation.
cats.appearanceEn: Large body, larger than average house cats, muscular and sturdy. Short to medium-length coat with soft texture, diverse colors, most commonly tabby and calico. Beautiful eye shape, mostly green, yellow-green or golden yellow. Erect ears of moderate size with long furnishings.
cats.personalityEn: Independent, friendly and adaptable. Retains some wild instincts but friendly to owners. Enjoys outdoor activities, good at climbing and hunting. Loyal to family members with rich emotions. Intelligent and clever with strong learning ability.
cats.careTipsEn: Relatively easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Provide enough activity space, better if allowed outdoor access. Regular checkups and deworming. Cyprus cats have robust health and aren't prone to illness. Balanced diet, maintain proper weight.

cats.name: 英国短毛猫
cats.description: 英国短毛猫是世界上最古老的猫种之一，其祖先可以追溯到古罗马时期。罗马人入侵英国时带来了埃及猫，这些猫与英国本土的野猫杂交，逐渐形成了英国短毛猫。英短以其圆胖的体型、短密的被毛和沉稳的性格著称，蓝色的英短（俗称"蓝猫"）最受欢迎。英短是目前全球最受欢迎的猫种之一，在中国也非常流行。
cats.appearance: 体型圆胖，身体矮壮，肌肉发达。被毛短而密实，毛绒绒的，像泰迪熊一样。毛色多样，最著名的是蓝色（英短蓝猫），还有白色、黑色、奶油色、虎斑色等多种。头部圆而大，脸颊饱满。眼睛大而圆，颜色通常为金色或铜色，蓝色英短的眼睛是古铜色。耳朵小而圆，位置较低。
cats.personality: 沉稳、安静、友好，性格温和。适应力强，容易相处。不太活跃，喜欢安静地待着。对主人友善，但不过度黏人。能与儿童和其他宠物友好相处。独立但也喜欢陪伴，适合各种家庭。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。注意控制饮食以防肥胖，英短容易发胖。不需要大量运动，但也需要适当的活动空间。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。定期清洁牙齿，预防牙周病。
cats.descriptionEn: The British Shorthair is one of the oldest cat breeds in the world, with ancestors dating back to ancient Roman times. When Romans invaded Britain, they brought Egyptian cats which crossed with native British wild cats, gradually forming the British Shorthair. Known for its round and chunky body, short dense coat and calm temperament, the blue British Shorthair (commonly called "blue cat") is the most popular. British Shorthair is currently one of the most popular cat breeds worldwide and is also very popular in China.
cats.appearanceEn: Round and chunky body, short and stocky with muscular build. Short, dense coat that is fluffy like a teddy bear. Diverse coat colors, most famously blue (British Blue), also available in white, black, cream, tabby and many others. Large round head with full cheeks. Large round eyes usually in gold or copper, British Blue has copper eyes. Small round ears set low.
cats.personalityEn: Calm, quiet and friendly with a gentle temperament. Strong adaptability, easy to get along with. Not very active, prefers to stay quietly. Friendly to owners but not overly clingy. Gets along well with children and other pets. Independent but also enjoys companionship, suitable for all types of households.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Watch diet to prevent obesity as British Shorthairs gain weight easily. Doesn't need much exercise but also needs proper activity space. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Regular teeth cleaning to prevent periodontal disease.

cats.name: 英国长毛猫
cats.description: 英国长毛猫是英国短毛猫的长毛版本，是在培育英国短毛猫的过程中偶然出现的长毛个体逐渐发展而来的。英国长毛猫保留了英短圆润可爱的外表和温和的性格，但拥有一身华丽的长毛。这种猫在英国和欧洲很受欢迎，被认为是完美的家庭宠物。
cats.appearance: 体型圆胖，与英短相似。被毛长而蓬松，非常浓密，毛色与英短相同，有很多种颜色。头部圆而大，脸颊饱满。眼睛大而圆，颜色多样。耳朵小而圆，位置较低，有长饰毛。尾巴蓬松，像松鼠尾巴一样。
cats.personality: 性格沉稳安静，温和友善。比英国短毛猫稍微粘人一些。对人亲近，喜欢陪伴主人。适应能力强，适合室内饲养。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。叫声轻柔，很少吵闹。
cats.careTips: 需要每天梳毛以防打结，长毛需要更多护理。定期清洁眼睛和耳朵。注意饮食控制，避免肥胖。换毛季节需要增加梳毛频率。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The British Longhair is the long-haired version of the British Shorthair, developed from long-haired individuals that appeared accidentally during the breeding of British Shorthairs. British Longhairs retain the round and cute appearance and gentle temperament of British Shorthairs but with a luxurious long coat. This breed is very popular in the UK and Europe, considered the perfect family pet.
cats.appearanceEn: Round and chunky body, similar to British Shorthair. Long, fluffy coat that is very thick, same colors as British Shorthair with many varieties. Large round head with full cheeks. Large round eyes in various colors. Small round ears set low with long furnishings. Fluffy tail like a squirrel's tail.
cats.personalityEn: Calm and quiet temperament, gentle and friendly. Somewhat more clingy than British Shorthair. Affectionate towards people, enjoys accompanying owners. Strong adaptability, suitable for indoor living. Gets along well with children and other pets. Soft voice, rarely noisy.
cats.careTipsEn: Daily brushing needed to prevent matting, long hair requires more care. Regular eye and ear cleaning. Watch diet to avoid obesity. Increase brushing frequency during shedding seasons. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health.

cats.name: 苏格兰折耳猫
cats.description: 苏格兰折耳猫是一种非常独特的猫种，以其向前折叠的耳朵而闻名。折耳猫起源于1961年的苏格兰，一只名叫苏西的农场猫生下了耳朵折叠的小猫，这就是折耳猫的始祖。由于折耳是基因突变造成的，这种猫可能会有骨骼和关节问题。折耳猫因为圆圆的脑袋和折耳，看起来像猫头鹰一样，非常可爱，深受人们喜爱。
cats.appearance: 最显著特征是向前折叠的耳朵，使头部呈圆形，看起来像猫头鹰。体型中等偏圆，身体结实。被毛短而密实，毛绒绒的，毛色非常多样。眼睛大而圆，表情甜美可爱。脸圆圆的，腮帮子饱满。
cats.personality: 性格极其温和、安静、友善。喜欢与人亲近，对主人忠诚。适应室内生活，不喜欢过度活跃。聪明好奇，喜欢观察周围的事物。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。叫声轻柔，很少叫。
cats.careTips: 注意耳朵健康，定期检查耳朵，折耳容易有耳部问题。折耳猫有关节疾病风险，应避免繁殖两只折耳猫。定期体检，注意骨骼和关节健康。控制体重，避免肥胖加重关节负担。被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。
cats.descriptionEn: The Scottish Fold is a very unique cat breed known for its folded ears that fold forward. The Fold originated in Scotland in 1961 when a farm cat named Susie gave birth to kittens with folded ears - this was the beginning of the Scottish Fold. Because the folded ear is caused by a genetic mutation, these cats may have bone and joint problems. Scottish Folds are loved for their round heads and folded ears that make them look like owls, very cute.
cats.appearanceEn: Most distinctive feature is the forward-folded ears, giving the head a round appearance making them look like owls. Medium-sized, slightly round body with sturdy build. Short, dense coat that is fluffy with very diverse colors. Large round eyes with a sweet and cute expression. Round face with full cheeks.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely gentle, quiet and friendly temperament. Enjoys being close to people, loyal to owners. Adapts to indoor living, doesn't like being overly active. Intelligent and curious, likes observing surroundings. Gets along well with children and other pets. Soft voice, rarely meows.
cats.careTipsEn: Pay attention to ear health, regularly check ears as Folds are prone to ear problems. Scottish Folds have joint disease risk, should avoid breeding two Folds together. Regular checkups, watch bone and joint health. Control weight to avoid加重关节负担. Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient.

cats.name: 苏格兰立耳猫
cats.description: 苏格兰立耳猫是苏格兰折耳猫的直耳版本。因为折耳是显性基因，每窝折耳猫中总会有一些耳朵正常直立的个体，这些就是苏格兰立耳猫。立耳猫虽然没有折耳的特征，但同样拥有折耳猫圆润可爱的外表和温和的性格，而且没有折耳猫的骨骼健康问题。
cats.appearance: 体型与折耳猫相似，中等偏圆。头部圆润，脸颊饱满。耳朵直立，大小适中，这是与折耳猫的唯一区别。眼睛大而圆，表情甜美。被毛短而密实，毛色多样。身体结实，肌肉发达。
cats.personality: 性格温和、友善、聪明。喜欢与人互动，对主人忠诚。比折耳猫稍微活泼一些。适应能力强，容易饲养。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。定期健康检查。苏格兰立耳猫体质好，没有折耳猫的骨骼问题。注意饮食均衡，避免肥胖。提供适当的玩具和活动空间。
cats.descriptionEn: The Scottish Straight is the straight-eared version of the Scottish Fold. Because the folded ear is a dominant gene, every litter of Scottish Folds will have some individuals with normal erect ears - these are Scottish Straights. While lacking the folded ear trait, Straights have the same round cute appearance and gentle temperament as Folds, without the skeletal health issues of folded-ear cats.
cats.appearanceEn: Body type similar to Scottish Fold, medium-sized and slightly round. Round head with full cheeks. Erect ears of moderate size, the only difference from Scottish Fold. Large round eyes with a sweet expression. Short dense coat in various colors. Sturdy body with muscular build.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle, friendly and intelligent temperament. Enjoys interacting with people, loyal to owners. Somewhat more active than Scottish Fold. Strong adaptability, easy to care for. Gets along well with children and other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Regular health checkups. Scottish Straights are healthy without the bone problems of folded-ear cats. Watch diet to avoid obesity. Provide appropriate toys and activity space.

cats.name: 马恩岛猫
cats.description: 马恩岛猫（英文名称：Manx），为一种原产于英国马恩岛的猫。这种猫的奇特之处在于，真正的纯种马恩岛猫是完全没有尾巴的，在普通猫尾巴的位置只有一个凹痕。在传说中，马恩岛猫由于较其他动物晚了一步搭上诺亚方舟，尾巴被门夹到，成为了无尾猫。不过在繁殖过程中，也能产生小尾、残尾、突尾的马恩岛猫。此外，马恩岛猫的脊椎也较普通猫为短。马恩岛猫体格健壮，较为长寿，且非常聪颖，是知名的宠物猫品种。其长毛品种，即威尔士猫。
cats.appearance: 最显著特征是无尾或只有极短的尾巴，根据尾巴长度可分为完全无尾、残尾、短尾和长尾四种类型。体型圆胖健壮，背部呈拱形，后肢比前肢长，走起路来像兔子一样跳跃，因此也被称为"兔子猫"。脊椎较普通猫为短。被毛短而密实，双层被毛，毛色非常多样。头部圆而大，眼睛大而圆，颜色多样，表情甜美。
cats.personality: 性格友善、聪明、活泼，智力在猫中名列前茅。忠诚于主人，喜欢与人互动，能与家庭成员建立深厚的感情。喜欢跳跃和攀爬，身手敏捷。好奇心强，喜欢探索新事物，学习能力出色。适应能力强，能适应各种环境。叫声独特而温和，是理想的家庭宠物。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。由于脊椎较短和独特的无尾基因，需特别注意脊椎和肠道健康，定期体检。提供猫爬架等攀爬设施，满足跳跃需求。注意控制体重，避免肥胖加重脊柱负担。日常注意补钙，有助于骨骼和脊椎健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Manx is a cat breed native to the Isle of Man in the UK. The unique feature of this breed is that true purebred Manx cats are completely tailless, with only a dimple where a normal cat's tail would be. According to legend, the Manx was the last animal to board Noah's Ark and its tail was caught in the door, making it a tailless cat. However, during breeding, Manx cats with small, residual, or protruding tails can also be produced. Additionally, the Manx has a shorter spine than ordinary cats. Manx cats are sturdy, long-lived, and very intelligent, making them a well-known pet cat breed. The long-haired variety of this breed is called the Cymric (Welsh cat).
cats.appearanceEn: The most distinctive feature is being tailless or having a very short tail, classified into four types based on tail length: rumpy, rumpy-riser, stubby, and longy. Round, sturdy body with arched back, hind legs longer than front legs, hop like rabbits when walking, hence also called "rabbit cat". Shorter spine than ordinary cats. Short, dense double coat with very diverse colors. Large round head with large round eyes in various colors and a sweet expression.
cats.personalityEn: Friendly, intelligent and active, ranking among the most intelligent cat breeds. Loyal to owners, enjoys interacting with people, and forms deep bonds with family members. Loves jumping and climbing with agile movements. Curious, enjoys exploring new things, and has excellent learning ability. Highly adaptable to various environments. Has a unique and gentle voice, making it an ideal family pet.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Due to the shorter spine and unique tailless gene, special attention should be paid to spine and intestinal health with regular checkups. Provide cat trees and climbing facilities to satisfy jumping needs. Watch weight control to avoid extra burden on the spine. Daily calcium supplementation is helpful for bone and spine health.

cats.name: 马恩岛长毛猫
cats.description: 马恩岛长毛猫，又称威尔士猫（Cymric在凯尔特语中意为威尔士），是马恩岛猫的长毛版本。这种猫在20世纪60年代被正式认可，是马恩岛猫长毛基因的表现。马恩岛长毛猫拥有和马恩岛猫一样的无尾特征和圆胖体型，但有一身华丽的长毛，看起来更加可爱。
cats.appearance: 体型中等，身体圆胖。被毛长而蓬松，双层被毛，非常浓密。无尾或短尾，与马恩岛猫相同。后肢比前肢长，走路呈跳跃状。毛色非常多样，各种颜色和图案都有。眼睛大而圆，颜色各异。
cats.personality: 性格友善、聪明、忠诚。喜欢与人互动，对家庭成员友好。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍。适应能力强，容易训练。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次，以防打结。注意脊椎健康，定期体检。提供足够活动空间和玩具。换毛季节需要增加梳毛频率。注意饮食控制，避免肥胖。
cats.descriptionEn: The Cymric, also known as the Welsh cat (Cymric means Welsh in Celtic), is the long-haired version of the Manx. This breed was officially recognized in the 1960s as an expression of the Manx long-hair gene. Cymric cats have the same tailless feature and round chunky body as Manx cats but with a luxurious long coat, making them look even cuter.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium body with round and chunky build. Long, fluffy double coat that is very thick. Tailless or short tail, same as Manx. Hind legs longer than front legs, hop when walking. Very diverse coat colors in all colors and patterns. Large round eyes in various colors.
cats.personalityEn: Friendly, intelligent and loyal. Enjoys interacting with people, friendly to family members. Active and playful. Strong adaptability, easy to train. Gets along well with children and other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week to prevent matting. Pay attention to spine health, regular checkups. Provide enough activity space and toys. Increase brushing frequency during shedding seasons. Watch diet to avoid obesity.

cats.name: 柯尼斯卷毛猫
cats.description: 柯尼斯卷毛猫，又称康沃尔帝王猫，是一种非常独特的卷毛猫品种，起源于英国的康沃尔郡。1950年，一只农场猫生下了一只卷毛的小猫，这就是柯尼斯卷毛猫的始祖。柯尼斯卷毛猫的被毛只有下层绒毛，没有护毛，因此被毛像波浪一样卷曲，摸起来像丝绸一样柔软。这种猫非常适合对猫毛过敏的人饲养。
cats.appearance: 被毛呈波浪状卷曲，非常柔软，像天鹅绒一样。只有下层绒毛，没有粗的护毛。体型修长优雅，像猎犬一样。腿长而细，腰部弓起，腹部收紧。头部长而窄，呈楔形。耳朵大而直立，位置高。眼睛椭圆形，颜色多样。
cats.personality: 极其活泼、好奇、好动。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和跳跃。聪明机灵，学习能力强，可以学会各种技巧。对人友好，喜欢与人互动。适应能力强，性格外向。保留了一些幼猫的特质，即使成年后也很爱玩。
cats.careTips: 被毛特殊，需要温和护理，不要过度梳理，以免损伤毛发。避免过度洗澡，会破坏皮肤油脂。因为只有绒毛，保暖性差，冬天要注意保暖。柯尼斯卷毛猫活泼好动，需要足够的运动空间。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Cornish Rex, also known as the Cornwall Rex, is a very unique curly-coated cat breed originating from Cornwall, England. In 1950, a farm cat gave birth to a curly-coated kitten, this was the beginning of the Cornish Rex. Cornish Rex has only the undercoat without guard hairs, so the coat is wavy and curly, feeling as soft as silk. This breed is very suitable for people with cat hair allergies.
cats.appearanceEn: Coat is wavy and curly, very soft like velvet. Only has undercoat without coarse guard hairs. Slender and elegant body like a greyhound. Long slender legs with arched back and tucked abdomen. Long narrow head, wedge-shaped. Large erect ears set high. Oval eyes in various colors.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely active, curious and playful. Full of energy, loves playing and jumping. Intelligent and clever with strong learning ability, can learn various tricks. Friendly towards people, enjoys interacting. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality. Retains some kitten traits, still very playful even as adults.
cats.careTipsEn: Special coat needs gentle care, don't over-brush to avoid damaging hair. Avoid excessive bathing as it will destroy skin oils. Only has undercoat, poor heat retention, keep warm in winter. Cornish Rex are active and need enough exercise space. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health.

cats.name: 德文卷毛猫
cats.description: 德文卷毛猫，又称德文帝王猫，是另一种独特的卷毛猫品种，起源于英国的德文郡。1960年，在德文郡发现了一只卷毛的流浪猫，这就是德文卷毛猫的始祖。德文卷毛猫的基因与柯尼斯卷毛猫不同，是独立的突变。德文卷毛猫因其精灵般的外表、大耳朵和卷曲的胡须，被称为"精灵猫"或"外星猫"，性格也非常活泼亲人。
cats.appearance: 被毛卷曲短而柔软，呈波浪状，比柯尼斯卷毛猫更粗糙一些。体型小到中等，苗条但肌肉发达。最显著的特征是大而直立的耳朵，位置很低，像精灵一样。头部呈楔形，颧骨高。眼睛大，呈椭圆形，颜色多样。胡须也是卷曲的。
cats.personality: 性格极其活泼、好奇、亲人。被称为"猫中猴子"，因为它们喜欢攀爬和跳跃。聪明机灵，学习能力强，能学会开门等技能。对人非常友好，喜欢与主人亲密接触。适应能力强，与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 需要注意保暖，被毛短且薄。被毛容易打理，但不要过度梳理。定期清洁耳朵，耳朵大容易积垢。德文卷毛猫活泼好动，需要大量玩具和活动空间。因为喜欢高处，提供猫爬架等攀爬设施。定期体检，注意心脏和肌肉健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Devon Rex, also known as the Devon Rex Cat, is another unique curly-coated cat breed originating from Devon, England. In 1960, a curly-coated stray cat was discovered in Devon, this was the ancestor of the Devon Rex. The Devon Rex gene is different from the Cornish Rex gene, being an independent mutation. Devon Rex are known as "elf cats" or "alien cats" due to their elf-like appearance, large ears and curly whiskers, with very lively and affectionate personalities.
cats.appearanceEn: Coat is short and curly, wavy, somewhat coarser than Cornish Rex. Small to medium body, slender but muscular. Most distinctive feature is large erect ears set very low, like an elf. Wedge-shaped head with high cheekbones. Large oval eyes in various colors. Whiskers are also curly.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely active, curious and affectionate. Called "monkey cats" because they love climbing and jumping. Intelligent and clever with strong learning ability, can learn to open doors. Very friendly towards people, enjoys close contact with owners. Strong adaptability, gets along well with children and other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Needs warmth as coat is short and thin. Easy to groom but don't over-brush. Regular ear cleaning as large ears accumulate wax easily. Devon Rex are active and need lots of toys and activity space. Provide cat trees for climbing as they like high places. Regular checkups, watch heart and muscle health.

cats.name: 东方短毛猫
cats.description: 东方短毛猫是暹罗猫的近亲品种，与暹罗猫有相同的体型和性格，只是毛色不同。东方短毛猫是在20世纪中期由英国和美国的育种者培育出来的，他们将暹罗猫与其他猫种交配，培育出各种毛色的品种，这些非重点色的暹罗猫就是东方短毛猫。东方短毛猫有超过300种毛色和图案，堪称猫界的"调色板"。
cats.appearance: 体型修长优雅，呈管状身材，与现代暹罗猫几乎相同。头部呈楔形，耳朵大而直立。被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体，毛色极其丰富，有300多种颜色和图案。眼睛为绿色，呈杏仁状（白色东方短毛猫可能是蓝色或鸳鸯眼）。四肢细长，尾巴长。
cats.personality: 极其聪明、好奇、活泼。与暹罗猫性格相似，喜欢与人互动。话多，叫声响亮。对主人忠诚，喜欢跟随主人。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。适应能力强，性格外向。
cats.careTips: 需要大量互动和关注，不能长时间独处。被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。东方短毛猫好奇心强，要注意家里的安全。定期体检，注意牙齿和肾脏健康。提供足够的玩具和活动空间。
cats.descriptionEn: The Oriental Shorthair is a close relative of the Siamese, sharing the same body type and personality but with different coat colors. Oriental Shorthairs were developed in the mid-20th century by breeders in the UK and USA, who crossed Siamese with other breeds to create various colors - these non-pointed Siamese became Oriental Shorthairs. Oriental Shorthairs have over 300 coat colors and patterns, making them the "color palette" of the cat world.
cats.appearanceEn: Slender and elegant body with tubular shape, almost identical to modern Siamese. Wedge-shaped head with large erect ears. Short, smooth coat lying close to the body with extremely rich colors, over 300 color and pattern varieties. Green almond-shaped eyes (white Oriental Shorthairs may have blue or odd eyes). Slender legs, long tail.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely intelligent, curious and active. Similar personality to Siamese, enjoys interacting with people. Talkative with loud voice. Loyal to owners, likes following owners around. Full of energy, loves playing and exploring. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality.
cats.careTipsEn: Needs lots of interaction and attention, cannot be left alone for long. Short coat easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Oriental Shorthairs are curious, pay attention to home safety. Regular checkups, watch dental and kidney health. Provide enough toys and activity space.

cats.name: 东方长毛猫
cats.description: 东方长毛猫是东方短毛猫的长毛版本，拥有东方猫的优雅体型和性格，但被毛是长的。东方长毛猫是在培育东方短毛猫的过程中出现的长毛个体发展而来的。这种猫结合了暹罗猫的优雅和长毛猫的华丽，非常美丽。
cats.appearance: 体型修长优雅，与东方短毛猫相同。被毛长而柔软，呈丝状，没有底层绒毛。毛色极其丰富，有多种颜色和图案。头部呈楔形，耳朵大而直立。眼睛呈杏仁状，颜色多为绿色。尾巴长而蓬松。
cats.personality: 性格聪明、好奇、亲人。与东方短毛猫性格相似，但可能稍微安静一些。喜欢与人互动，对家庭成员友好。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍。适应能力强，容易训练。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次，但因为没有底层绒毛，比波斯猫容易打理。需要足够互动和关注。定期体检，注意牙齿和肾脏健康。提供足够的玩具和活动空间。
cats.descriptionEn: The Oriental Longhair is the long-haired version of the Oriental Shorthair, with the elegant body type and personality of Oriental cats but with long hair. Oriental Longhairs developed from long-haired individuals that appeared during the breeding of Oriental Shorthairs. This breed combines the elegance of Siamese with the magnificence of long-haired cats, very beautiful.
cats.appearanceEn: Slender and elegant body, same as Oriental Shorthair. Long, soft coat with silky texture, without undercoat. Extremely rich coat colors in various colors and patterns. Wedge-shaped head with large erect ears. Almond-shaped eyes mostly in green. Long fluffy tail.
cats.personalityEn: Intelligent, curious and affectionate. Similar personality to Oriental Shorthair but possibly somewhat quieter. Enjoys interacting with people, friendly to family members. Active and playful. Strong adaptability, easy to train.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week, but easier to care for than Persian due to lack of undercoat. Needs enough interaction and attention. Regular checkups, watch dental and kidney health. Provide enough toys and activity space.

cats.name: 夏特尔猫
cats.description: 夏特尔猫，又称沙特莱克斯猫，是法国的国宝级猫种，也是世界上最古老的自然品种之一。夏特尔猫的起源可以追溯到16世纪，甚至更早。传说这种猫是由法国的夏特尔修道院的僧侣饲养的，因此得名。夏特尔猫以其独特的蓝灰色被毛和金色的眼睛著称，性格温和安静，是法国最受欢迎的猫种之一。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而密实，呈独特的蓝灰色，在光线下会呈现不同的色泽，像羊毛一样。体型中等偏大，身体强壮，肌肉发达，但又不失优雅。头部较宽，脸颊饱满，有微笑的表情。眼睛为金色或铜色，大而圆，非常明亮。耳朵中等大小，直立。
cats.personality: 性格安静、温和、忠诚。被称为"沉默的蓝猫"，很少叫。对主人感情深厚，忠诚可靠。适应能力强，能适应各种环境。聪明好奇，喜欢观察。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。性格安静，不需要大量运动。注意饮食控制，夏特尔猫容易发胖。定期体检，注意肾脏和泌尿系统健康。夏特尔猫对主人忠诚，需要适当的陪伴。
cats.descriptionEn: The Chartreux, also known as the Carles cats, is a national treasure cat breed of France and one of the oldest natural breeds in the world. The origin of Chartreux can be traced back to the 16th century or even earlier. Legend has it that this breed was kept by monks at the Chartreux monastery in France, hence the name. Chartreux are known for their unique blue-gray coat and golden eyes with a calm and quiet temperament, one of the most popular cat breeds in France.
cats.appearanceEn: Short, dense coat in unique blue-gray that shows different shades in light, like sheep's wool. Medium to large body, strong and muscular yet elegant. Relatively wide head with full cheeks and a smiling expression. Golden or copper eyes, large and round, very bright. Medium-sized erect ears.
cats.personalityEn: Quiet, gentle and loyal temperament. Called the "silent blue cat", rarely meows. Forms deep bonds with owners, loyal and reliable. Strong adaptability to various environments. Intelligent and curious, likes observing. Gets along well with children and other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Calm temperament, doesn't need much exercise. Watch diet as Chartreux gains weight easily. Regular checkups, watch kidney and urinary system health. Chartreux are loyal to owners and need proper companionship.

cats.name: 德国卷毛猫
cats.description: 德国卷毛猫是德国独特的卷毛猫品种，与柯尼斯卷毛猫和德文卷毛猫不同，是独立的自然突变品种。德国卷毛猫在第二次世界大战后的1947年左右出现在德国，是独立的卷毛基因突变。德国卷毛猫的被毛比其他卷毛猫更柔软，性格也非常温和友善。
cats.appearance: 被毛呈卷曲状，比柯尼斯卷毛猫更粗糙一些，但非常柔软。体型中等，肌肉发达，身体匀称。头部圆润，脸颊饱满。耳朵中等大小，直立。眼睛大而圆，颜色多样。胡须也是卷曲的。四肢长度适中。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、聪明、友善。喜欢与人互动，适应力强。温和亲人，对主人忠诚。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。容易训练，学习能力强。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要温和护理，避免过度洗澡。定期梳理但不要太频繁，以免损伤卷曲。德国卷毛猫活泼，需要足够的活动空间。定期体检，注意皮肤健康。注意保暖，被毛保暖性不如普通短毛猫。
cats.descriptionEn: The German Rex is a unique curly-coated cat breed from Germany, different from Cornish Rex and Devon Rex, being an independent natural mutation. German Rex appeared in Germany around 1947 after World War II, as an independent curly hair gene mutation. German Rex has softer coat than other curly cats, with very gentle and friendly temperament.
cats.appearanceEn: Coat is curly, somewhat coarser than Cornish Rex but very soft. Medium body, muscular and well-proportioned. Round head with full cheeks. Medium-sized erect ears. Large round eyes in various colors. Whiskers are also curly. Medium-length legs.
cats.personalityEn: Active, intelligent and friendly temperament. Enjoys interacting with people with strong adaptability. Gentle and affectionate, loyal to owners. Active and playful. Gets along well with children and other pets. Easy to train with strong learning ability.
cats.careTipsEn: Coat needs gentle care, avoid excessive bathing. Regular brushing but not too frequently to avoid damaging curls. German Rex are active and need enough activity space. Regular checkups, watch skin health. Keep warm as coat is not as insulating as regular short hair.

cats.name: 俄罗斯蓝猫
cats.description: 俄罗斯蓝猫，又称阿契安吉蓝猫，是世界上最著名的猫种之一，以其银蓝色的被毛和绿色的眼睛著称。这种猫起源于俄罗斯北部的阿尔汉格尔斯克港，因此也被称为"天使蓝猫"。俄罗斯蓝猫是自然形成的品种，有着上千年的历史。在俄罗斯，蓝猫被认为是吉祥的象征，能带来好运和繁荣。
cats.appearance: 体型修长优雅，中等体型，肌肉发达但线条优美。被毛短而密实，呈独特的银蓝色，毛尖是银色的，看起来闪闪发光，像铺了一层银粉。眼睛为深绿色，呈杏仁状，非常美丽。耳朵大而直立，位置较高。脸型稍圆，表情甜美。
cats.personality: 性格安静、温柔、害羞。对陌生人警惕，但与主人关系亲密后非常忠诚。感情细腻，对主人的情绪敏感。不太喜欢吵闹的环境，喜欢安静的家庭。聪明好奇，喜欢观察。适应能力较强，但需要时间适应新环境。
cats.careTips: 被毛打理简单，每周梳毛一次即可，定期用丝绸擦拭可增加光泽。适合室内饲养，避免外出。俄罗斯蓝猫性格敏感，需要稳定的生活环境。注意饮食均衡，这种猫容易挑食。定期体检，注意泌尿系统健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Russian Blue, also known as the Archangel Blue, is one of the most famous cat breeds in the world, known for its silver-blue coat and green eyes. This breed originated from the Arkhangelsk port in northern Russia, also called "Angel Blue Cat". Russian Blue is a naturally occurring breed with a history of thousands of years. In Russia, blue cats are considered a symbol of good luck, bringing prosperity and good fortune.
cats.appearanceEn: Slender and elegant body, medium size, muscular yet gracefully proportioned. Short dense coat in unique silver-blue with silver tips, appearing sparkling and shimmery like scattered silver powder. Deep green almond-shaped eyes, very beautiful. Large erect ears set high. Slightly round face with a sweet expression.
cats.personalityEn: Quiet, gentle and shy temperament. Wary of strangers but very loyal once bonded with owners. Sensitive and emotionally attuned to owners. Prefers quiet environments. Intelligent and curious, likes observing. Strong adaptability but needs time to adjust to new environments.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient, wiping with silk cloth can enhance shine. Suitable for indoor living, avoid going outside. Russian Blue is sensitive and needs a stable living environment. Watch diet as this breed tends to be picky. Regular checkups, watch urinary system health.

cats.name: 西伯利亚森林猫
cats.description: 西伯利亚森林猫是俄罗斯最大的本土猫种，也是世界上最大的猫种之一。这种猫在俄罗斯西伯利亚地区自然演化了数百年，为了适应严寒的气候，进化出了厚实的三层被毛。西伯利亚森林猫是俄罗斯的国猫，在俄罗斯文化中占有重要地位。有趣的是，西伯利亚森林猫的猫毛蛋白含量较低，很多对猫过敏的人可以耐受这种猫。
cats.appearance: 大型猫种，身体强壮，肌肉发达，体型魁梧。拥有三层被毛（护毛、芒毛、绒毛），非常厚实，可以抵御极寒天气。被毛长而蓬松，颈部有华丽的鬃毛，尾巴蓬松如松鼠。毛色非常多样，最经典的是虎斑色。眼睛大而圆，颜色多样。
cats.personality: 性格友善、温和、聪明。虽然体型大，但性格非常温柔，被称为"温柔的巨人"。对人友好，喜欢与人互动。对儿童非常有耐心，是很好的家庭宠物。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍和攀爬。适应能力强，能适应各种环境。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次，换季时更需注意。西伯利亚森林猫活泼，需要足够的活动空间和猫爬架。虽然体型大，但不需要特别多的食物，注意控制体重。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。这种猫成熟期晚，需要5年才能完全长大。
cats.descriptionEn: The Siberian is Russia's largest native cat breed and one of the largest in the world. This breed evolved naturally in Russia's Siberia region for hundreds of years, developing a thick triple coat to survive the extreme cold climate. The Siberian is Russia's national cat and holds an important place in Russian culture. Interestingly, Siberian cats produce less Fel d 1 protein, so many people with cat allergies can tolerate them.
cats.appearanceEn: Large cat with strong, muscular, powerful build. Has a triple coat (guard hairs, awn hairs, and down undercoat) that is very thick and can withstand extreme cold weather. Long fluffy coat with a luxurious mane around the neck, tail fluffy like a squirrel's. Very diverse coat colors, most classically tabby. Large round eyes in various colors.
cats.personalityEn: Friendly, gentle and intelligent temperament. Despite large size, very gentle, called the "Gentle Giant". Friendly to people, enjoys interacting. Very patient with children, excellent family pet. Active and playful, loves playing and climbing. Strong adaptability to various environments.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week, especially during seasonal changes. Siberians are active and need enough activity space and cat trees. Despite large size, doesn't need excessive food, watch weight. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. This breed matures late, needing about 5 years to fully grow.

cats.name: 涅瓦假面猫
cats.description: 涅瓦假面猫是西伯利亚森林猫的重点色变种，也就是有色块分布的西伯利亚森林猫。涅瓦假面猫的名字来源于俄罗斯的涅瓦河，"假面"指的是它们脸上的重点色，像戴了面具一样。这种猫在20世纪90年代被正式认可，是西伯利亚森林猫的一个独立变种。涅瓦假面猫拥有西伯利亚猫的强壮体型和温和性格，同时拥有美丽的蓝色眼睛。
cats.appearance: 大型猫种，体型强壮，与西伯利亚森林猫相同。被毛厚实，长而蓬松。特点是重点色分布，身体是浅色，脸部、耳朵、四肢和尾巴是深色。眼睛为深蓝色，非常美丽。毛色有海豹色、蓝色、巧克力色等多种重点色。
cats.personality: 性格温和友善，喜欢与人亲近。聪明活泼，适应室内生活。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍和攀爬。
cats.careTips: 需要定期梳毛，保持被毛整洁。提供足够互动和活动空间。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。换毛季节需要增加梳毛频率。注意饮食均衡，避免肥胖。
cats.descriptionEn: The Neva Masquerade is a colorpoint variant of the Siberian cat, a Siberian with color points. The name comes from Russia's Neva River, with "masquerade" referring to their masked facial colorpoints. This breed was officially recognized in the 1990s as an independent variant of the Siberian. Neva Masquerades have the sturdy build and gentle temperament of Siberians along with beautiful blue eyes.
cats.appearanceEn: Large cat with sturdy build, same as Siberian. Thick, long and fluffy coat. Features colorpoint distribution with light body and dark face, ears, paws and tail. Deep blue eyes, very beautiful. Coat colors include seal, blue, chocolate and various colorpoints.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle and friendly temperament, enjoys being close to people. Intelligent and active, adapts to indoor living. Loyal to owners with rich emotions. Gets along well with children and other pets. Active and playful, loves playing and climbing.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed to keep coat clean. Provide enough interaction and activity space. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Increase brushing frequency during shedding seasons. Watch diet to avoid obesity.

cats.name: 顿斯科伊无毛猫
cats.description: 顿斯科伊无毛猫，又称顿河无毛猫，是俄罗斯独特的无毛猫品种，起源于1987年的罗斯托夫市。一位名叫艾琳娜·科瓦列娃的女子在当地发现了一只无毛的小猫，这就是顿斯科伊无毛猫的始祖。顿斯科伊无毛猫的无毛基因与加拿大斯芬克斯猫不同，是独立的基因突变。这种猫出生时可能有毛，后来逐渐脱落。
cats.appearance: 最显著特征是无毛或只有极短的绒毛。皮肤呈粉红色或有色素斑点，有些个体有斑点或图案。体型中等，肌肉发达，身体结实。头部呈楔形，耳朵大而直立。眼睛呈杏仁状，颜色多样。尾巴长而直。
cats.personality: 极其热情、活泼、亲人。喜欢与人亲密接触，非常粘人。对主人忠诚，喜欢跟随主人。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍和探索。适应能力强，与其他宠物相处友好。性格外向，不怕陌生人。
cats.careTips: 需要定期洗澡清洁皮肤油脂，通常每周一次。皮肤敏感，需要防晒，避免长时间暴露在阳光下。冬季需要保暖，可以穿衣服。注意皮肤保湿，避免干燥。定期清洁耳朵和指甲。顿斯科伊猫体温较高，新陈代谢快，需要更多食物。
cats.descriptionEn: The Donskoy, also known as the Don Hairless, is a unique hairless cat breed from Russia, originating from Rostov-on-Don in 1987. A woman named Elena Kovaleva discovered a hairless kitten in her area, this was the ancestor of the Donskoy. The Donskoy's hairless gene is different from the Canadian Sphynx gene, being an independent mutation. These cats may be born with fur which gradually falls out later.
cats.appearanceEn: Most distinctive feature is being hairless or having only very short fuzz. Skin can be pink or have pigmented spots, some individuals have spotted or patterned skin. Medium body, muscular and sturdy. Wedge-shaped head with large erect ears. Almond-shaped eyes in various colors. Long straight tail.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely enthusiastic, active and affectionate. Enjoys close contact with people, very clingy. Loyal to owners, likes following owners around. Intelligent and curious, loves playing and exploring. Strong adaptability, gets along well with other pets. Outgoing personality, not afraid of strangers.
cats.careTipsEn: Needs regular baths to clean skin oils, usually once a week. Sensitive skin needs sun protection, avoid prolonged sun exposure. Needs warmth in winter, can wear clothes. Keep skin moisturized, avoid dryness. Regular ear and nail cleaning. Donskoy cats have higher body temperature and fast metabolism, need more food.

cats.name: 彼得秃猫
cats.description: 彼得秃猫，又称彼得堡无毛猫，是俄罗斯圣彼得堡培育的无毛猫品种。这种猫是1994年由顿斯科伊无毛猫和东方短毛猫杂交培育而成的，因此既有顿斯科伊的无毛特征，又有东方猫的优雅体型。彼得秃猫是俄罗斯最新的猫品种之一，以其东方型的外表和无毛特征而闻名。
cats.appearance: 体型修长优雅，呈东方型（楔形头、大耳朵、细长身体）。无毛或只有极短绒毛，皮肤光滑，有些个体有绒面质感。头部呈楔形，耳朵大而直立，位置较低。眼睛呈杏仁状，颜色多样。四肢细长，尾巴长而细。
cats.personality: 性格极其聪明、活泼、亲人。喜欢与人互动，对主人忠诚。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。适应能力强，性格外向。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。聪明机灵，学习能力强。
cats.careTips: 皮肤需要特别护理，定期洗澡清洁油脂。需要注意防晒和保暖。彼得秃猫活泼好动，需要足够的玩具和活动空间。定期体检，注意皮肤和心脏健康。因为新陈代谢快，需要充足的高质量食物。
cats.descriptionEn: The Peterbald, also known as the Petersburg Hairless, is a hairless cat breed developed in St. Petersburg, Russia. This breed was created in 1994 by crossing the Donskoy with the Oriental Shorthair, thus inheriting both the Donskoy's hairless trait and the Oriental's elegant body type. Peterbald is one of Russia's newest cat breeds, known for its Oriental-type appearance and hairless features.
cats.appearanceEn: Slender and elegant body, Oriental type (wedge-shaped head, large ears, elongated body). Hairless or with very short fuzz, smooth skin, some individuals have a chamois-like texture. Wedge-shaped head with large erect ears set low. Almond-shaped eyes in various colors. Slender legs, long thin tail.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely intelligent, active and affectionate. Enjoys interacting with people, loyal to owners. Full of energy, loves playing and exploring. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality. Gets along well with children and other pets. Intelligent and clever with strong learning ability.
cats.careTipsEn: Skin needs special care, regular bathing to clean oils. Needs sun protection and warmth. Peterbalds are active and need enough toys and activity space. Regular checkups, watch skin and heart health. Due to fast metabolism, needs sufficient high-quality food.

cats.name: 挪威森林猫
cats.description: 挪威森林猫是挪威的国猫，也是北欧最著名的猫种。这种猫在挪威已经生活了数千年，是维京人带到北欧的猫与当地野猫杂交的后代。在挪威神话中，森林猫是爱神弗蕾亚的坐骑，拉着她的战车在天空中飞行。挪威森林猫以其厚实的被毛和出色的攀爬能力著称，是真正的森林猎手。
cats.appearance: 大型猫种，身体强壮，肌肉发达。拥有厚实的双层被毛，可以抵御严寒的北欧气候。颈部长有华丽的鬃毛，像围脖一样。毛色非常多样，有各种颜色和图案。耳朵大而直立，有长饰毛，耳尖有丛毛（猞猁般的耳毛）。爪子大而有力，适合攀爬。尾巴长而蓬松。
cats.personality: 性格沉稳、友好、独立。对人友好，但保留了一定的独立性。聪明好奇，喜欢探索和攀爬。捕猎能力强，是出色的猎手。适应能力强，能适应各种环境。对家庭忠诚，与儿童相处友好。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，尤其是在换季时，每周2-3次。需要足够的攀爬空间，最好有猫爬架或猫树。挪威森林猫活泼好动，需要足够的活动空间。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。注意控制体重，避免肥胖。
cats.descriptionEn: The Norwegian Forest Cat is Norway's national cat and one of the most famous cat breeds in Scandinavia. This breed has lived in Norway for thousands of years, descended from cats brought by Vikings crossed with local wild cats. In Norwegian mythology, forest cats were the mounts of the love goddess Freya, pulling her chariot across the sky. Norwegian Forest Cats are known for their thick coats and excellent climbing abilities, true forest hunters.
cats.appearanceEn: Large cat with strong, muscular body. Has a thick double coat that can withstand the cold Nordic climate. Luxurious mane around the neck like a scarf. Very diverse coat colors in all colors and patterns. Large erect ears with long furnishings and ear tufts (lynx-like ear tips). Large powerful paws suitable for climbing. Long fluffy tail.
cats.personalityEn: Calm, friendly and independent temperament. Friendly to people but retains some independence. Intelligent and curious, likes exploring and climbing. Excellent hunting ability, skilled hunters. Strong adaptability to various environments. Loyal to family, friendly with children.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, especially during seasonal changes, 2-3 times a week. Needs enough climbing space, preferably cat towers or trees. Norwegian Forest Cats are active and need enough activity space. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Watch weight to avoid obesity.

cats.name: 拉邦卷毛猫
cats.description: 拉邦卷毛猫是一种独特的卷毛猫品种，以其蓬松的卷曲被毛而著称。拉邦卷毛猫起源于1982年的美国俄勒冈州，一只农场猫生下了一只无毛的小猫，后来长出了卷曲的被毛，这就是拉邦卷毛猫的始祖。拉邦卷毛猫的名字来源于它被毛的质感，"LaPerm"意为"波浪状的"。这种猫虽然起源于美国，但在芬兰和欧洲非常受欢迎。
cats.appearance: 被毛呈松散的卷曲状，长短均有，非常蓬松柔软。有短毛和长毛两个变种。卷曲程度各不相同，有的是大波浪，有的是紧密的小卷。体型中等，身体匀称。头部略呈楔形，耳朵大而直立。眼睛大，呈杏仁状，颜色多样。
cats.personality: 性格温和、友善、亲人。喜欢与人互动，对主人忠诚。适应力强，能适应各种家庭环境。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。活泼但不过度好动。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，但不需要过度护理，每周2-3次即可。过度梳理可能会损伤卷曲的毛发。拉邦卷毛猫掉毛少，适合对猫毛敏感的人。定期体检，注意皮肤健康。注意饮食均衡，保持适当体重。
cats.descriptionEn: The LaPerm is a unique curly-coated cat breed known for its fluffy, curly coat. LaPerm originated in Oregon, USA in 1982, when a farm cat gave birth to a hairless kitten that later grew a curly coat - this was the ancestor of the LaPerm. The name LaPerm comes from the texture of its coat, meaning "wavy" or "curly". Although originating in the USA, this breed is very popular in Finland and Europe.
cats.appearanceEn: Coat is loosely curly, available in both long and short lengths, very fluffy and soft. Varying degrees of curl, from large waves to tight ringlets. Medium body, well-proportioned. Slightly wedge-shaped head with large erect ears. Large almond-shaped eyes in various colors.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle, friendly and affectionate temperament. Enjoys interacting with people, loyal to owners. Strong adaptability, can adapt to various household environments. Intelligent and curious, likes playing. Gets along well with children and other pets. Active but not overly energetic.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed but not excessive grooming, 2-3 times a week is sufficient. Over-brushing may damage the curly hair. LaPerms shed less, suitable for people sensitive to cat hair. Regular checkups, watch skin health. Balanced diet, maintain proper weight.

cats.name: 希腊阿提卡猫
cats.description: 希腊阿提卡猫是希腊古老的本土猫种，主要分布在希腊的阿提卡地区。这种猫在希腊已经生活了数千年，被认为是最古老的家猫品种之一。在古希腊，猫被视为神圣的动物，受到尊敬和保护。阿提卡猫适应了地中海气候，身体健壮，抗病能力强。
cats.appearance: 体型中等，身体匀称，肌肉发达。被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体，有光泽。毛色多样，常见的有虎斑色、三花色、黑色、白色等。眼睛呈杏仁状，颜色多为黄绿色或金色。耳朵直立，大小适中。
cats.personality: 性格独立、友善、适应力强。保留了一定的野性本能，但对主人友好。喜欢户外活动，擅长捕猎。聪明机灵，生存能力强。对家庭成员忠诚，感情丰富。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。适应地中海气候，耐热能力强。如果允许户外活动，需要定期驱虫和体检。提供足够的活动空间。注意防暑降温，保持充足饮水。
cats.descriptionEn: The Greek Attica Cat is an ancient native cat breed from Greece, primarily distributed in the Attica region. This breed has lived in Greece for thousands of years and is considered one of the oldest domestic cat breeds. In ancient Greece, cats were revered as sacred animals. Attica cats have adapted to the Mediterranean climate with robust health and strong disease resistance.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium body, well-proportioned with muscular build. Short, smooth coat lying close to the body with a sheen. Diverse coat colors, commonly tabby, calico, black, white and others. Almond-shaped eyes mostly in yellow-green or gold. Erect ears of moderate size.
cats.personalityEn: Independent, friendly and adaptable. Retains some wild instincts but friendly to owners. Enjoys outdoor activities, skilled at hunting. Intelligent and resourceful with excellent survival skills. Loyal to family members with rich emotions.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Adapted to Mediterranean climate with strong heat tolerance. If allowed outdoor access, regular deworming and checkups needed. Provide enough activity space. Pay attention to cooling down in summer, keep sufficient water.

cats.name: 西西里短毛猫
cats.description: 西西里短毛猫是意大利西西里岛的本土猫种，是地中海猫种的代表之一。这种猫在西西里岛上已经生活了数千年，是自然演化形成的品种。西西里短毛猫适应了地中海气候，体质健壮，抗病能力强。在意大利，这种猫是非常常见的家猫，深受人们喜爱。
cats.appearance: 体型中等，身体匀称，肌肉结实。被毛短而光滑，有光泽。毛色多样，常见的有灰色、虎斑色、黑色等。眼睛大而明亮，颜色多为黄色或绿色。耳朵直立，大小适中。四肢强壮有力。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、友善、好奇。对人友好，喜欢与人互动。聪明机灵，学习能力强。适应能力强，能适应各种环境。活泼好动，喜欢玩耍和探索。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。提供足够活动空间和玩具。定期体检和驱虫。适应地中海气候，耐热性好。注意饮食均衡，保持适当体重。
cats.descriptionEn: The Sicilian Shorthair is a native cat breed of Sicily, Italy, and one of the representatives of Mediterranean cat breeds. This cat has lived on Sicily for thousands of years, evolving naturally. Sicilian Shorthairs have adapted to the Mediterranean climate with robust health and strong disease resistance. In Italy, this cat is a very common house cat, deeply loved by people.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium body, well-proportioned with sturdy muscles. Short, smooth coat with a sheen. Diverse coat colors, commonly gray, tabby, black and others. Large bright eyes mostly yellow or green. Erect ears of moderate size. Strong legs with good strength.
cats.personalityEn: Active, friendly and curious. Friendly to people, enjoys interacting. Intelligent and clever with strong learning ability. Strong adaptability to various environments. Active and playful, loves playing and exploring.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Provide enough activity space and toys. Regular checkups and deworming. Adapted to Mediterranean climate with good heat tolerance. Balanced diet, maintain proper weight.

cats.name: 埃及猫
cats.description: 埃及猫被认为是古埃及神明的后裔，是世界上最古老的猫种之一。在古埃及，猫被视为神圣的动物，埃及猫更是被视为月亮女神巴斯特的化身，地位崇高。埃及猫是少数天然有斑点的家猫品种，其斑点花纹是自然形成的。埃及猫也是家猫中速度最快的品种，奔跑速度可达每小时48公里。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而有光泽，呈独特的野生斑点图案，是唯一天然有斑点的家猫品种。斑点随机分布在身体上，每只猫的斑点都独一无二。底色有银色、青铜色、黑烟色等。体型中等，肌肉发达，后肢比前肢长，适合奔跑。眼睛呈杏仁状，浅绿色，表情警觉。耳朵大而直立。
cats.personality: 极其聪明、活泼、好奇。保留了一定的野性本能，警觉性高。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。喜欢玩耍，精力充沛。适应能力强，但对陌生人警惕。喜欢高处，擅长跳跃。
cats.careTips: 需要足够的运动空间，埃及猫精力旺盛，喜欢奔跑和跳跃。提供猫爬架等高处设施。被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。埃及猫对温度敏感，注意保暖。
cats.descriptionEn: Egyptian Mau is considered a descendant of ancient Egyptian deities and is one of the oldest cat breeds in the world. In ancient Egypt, cats were regarded as sacred animals, and the Egyptian Mau was especially revered as the incarnation of the moon goddess Bast, holding a lofty status. Egyptian Mau is one of the few domestic cats with natural spotted markings, which formed naturally. Egyptian Mau is also the fastest domestic cat, capable of running up to 48 km/h.
cats.appearanceEn: Short, glossy coat with unique wild spotted pattern, the only domestic cat breed with natural spots. Spots are randomly distributed on the body, unique to each cat. Base colors include silver, bronze, and black smoke. Medium body with muscular development, hind legs longer than front legs, suitable for running. Almond-shaped light green eyes with an alert expression. Large erect ears.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely intelligent, active and curious. Retains some wild instincts, highly alert. Loyal to owners with rich emotions. Loves playing with abundant energy. Strong adaptability but wary of strangers. Loves high places, excellent at jumping.
cats.careTipsEn: Needs enough exercise space as Egyptian Mau are energetic and love running and jumping. Provide cat trees and high places. Short coat easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Egyptian Mau are temperature sensitive, keep warm.

cats.name: 阿比西尼亚猫
cats.description: 阿比西尼亚猫，简称"阿比"，是世界上最古老的纯种猫之一，被认为是古埃及猫的直系后裔。阿比西尼亚猫的外表与古埃及壁画中的猫非常相似，有着悠久的历史。这种猫的名字来源于阿比西尼亚（今埃塞俄比亚），但实际起源地仍有争议。阿比西尼亚猫以其独特的渐变被毛和活泼的性格著称，是全球最受欢迎的短毛猫之一。
cats.appearance: 体型修长优雅，肌肉发达，线条优美。被毛短而密，每根毛发都有颜色渐变（毛尖色深，毛根色浅），这种效果被称为"刺鼠色"或"阿比西尼亚纹"。最经典的颜色是红褐色（原始色），还有蓝色、奶油色等。眼睛呈杏仁状，颜色为金色或绿色。耳朵大而直立，位置高。
