cats.personality: 极其聪明、好奇、活泼。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。被称为"猫中的探险家"，对一切都充满好奇。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人互动，但不过度粘人。喜欢高处，擅长攀爬。适应能力强，性格外向。
cats.careTips: 需要大量活动和互动，不能长时间独处。被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。阿比西尼亚猫好奇心强，要注意家里的安全。提供猫爬架等攀爬设施。定期体检，注意牙齿和肾脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Abyssinian, commonly called "Aby", is one of the oldest purebred cats in the world, considered a direct descendant of ancient Egyptian cats. The Abyssinian's appearance is very similar to cats depicted in ancient Egyptian murals, with a long history. The breed name comes from Abyssinia (modern Ethiopia), but its actual origin is still debated. Abyssinians are known for their unique ticked coat and lively personality, making them one of the most popular shorthair cats globally.
cats.appearanceEn: Slender and elegant body with well-developed muscles and graceful lines. Short, dense coat with each hair having color gradation (dark tips, light roots), called "ticking" or "Abyssinian pattern". Most classic color is ruddy (original), also available in blue, cream and others. Almond-shaped eyes in gold or green. Large erect ears set high.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely intelligent, curious and active. Full of energy, loves playing and exploring. Called the "explorer among cats" with curiosity about everything. Loyal to owners, enjoys interacting but not overly clingy. Loves high places, excellent at climbing. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality.
cats.careTipsEn: Needs lots of activity and interaction, cannot be left alone for long. Short coat easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Abyssinians are curious, pay attention to home safety. Provide cat trees and climbing facilities. Regular checkups, watch dental and kidney health.

cats.name: 索马里长毛猫
cats.description: 索马里长毛猫，简称索马里猫，是阿比西尼亚猫的长毛版本。索马里猫的出现完全是意外——20世纪60年代，一些阿比西尼亚猫的后代突然出现了长毛个体，这是因为携带了隐性长毛基因。这些长毛个体被单独培育，形成了索马里猫品种。索马里猫拥有阿比猫的性格和美丽的长毛，特别是那条蓬松的狐狸尾巴非常引人注目。
cats.appearance: 体型中等，与阿比西尼亚猫相似但稍显丰满。被毛长而蓬松，每根毛发都有渐变颜色，与阿比猫相同。尾巴特别蓬松，像狐狸的尾巴，是索马里猫的标志性特征。颈部长有鬃毛，耳朵有饰毛。眼睛呈杏仁状，颜色为金色或绿色。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、好奇、亲人。与阿比西尼亚猫性格相似，但可能稍微安静一些。聪明机灵，喜欢玩耍和探索。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人互动。适应能力强，性格外向。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次，以防打结。但因为只有一层毛，比波斯猫容易打理。需要足够的活动空间和玩具。定期体检，注意牙齿和肾脏健康。换毛季节需要增加梳毛频率。
cats.descriptionEn: The Somali, also known simply as Somali, is the long-haired version of the Abyssinian. Somali cats appeared completely by accident - in the 1960s, some Abyssinian cats suddenly produced long-haired kittens due to carrying a recessive long-hair gene. These long-haired individuals were bred separately, forming the Somali breed. Somali cats have the Abyssinian's personality and beautiful long fur, especially the fluffy fox-like tail which is a striking feature.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium body, similar to Abyssinian but slightly fuller. Long, fluffy coat with ticked coloring same as Abyssinian. Especially fluffy tail like a fox's tail, the signature feature of Somali cats. Mane around neck, furnished ears. Almond-shaped eyes in gold or green.
cats.personalityEn: Active, curious and affectionate. Similar personality to Abyssinian but possibly somewhat quieter. Intelligent and clever, likes playing and exploring. Loyal to owners, enjoys interacting. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week to prevent matting. But easier to care for than Persian due to single coat. Needs enough activity space and toys. Regular checkups, watch dental and kidney health. Increase brushing frequency during shedding seasons.

cats.name: 索科克森林猫
cats.description: 索科克森林猫，简称索科克猫，是非洲肯尼亚索科克森林的特有猫种，也是非洲最稀有的猫种之一。这种猫是在20世纪70年代被发现的，被认为是自然形成的古老品种。索科克猫是真正的森林猫，保留了很多野生猫的特征。由于数量稀少，索科克猫被列为稀有品种，在全球范围内都很少见。
cats.appearance: 体型中等偏小，身体修长，肌肉结实。被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体。毛色为独特的黄褐色虎斑，花纹像树皮一样，是很好的保护色。眼睛呈杏仁状，颜色多为浅绿色或琥珀色。耳朵大而直立，位置较高。四肢细长，擅长攀爬。
cats.personality: 性格独立、活跃、好奇。保留了较多的野性本能，警觉性高。喜欢树栖生活，擅长攀爬和跳跃。对主人忠诚，但需要时间建立信任。聪明机灵，适应能力强。活泼好动，精力充沛。
cats.careTips: 需要大量活动空间，最好能有猫爬架或户外活动空间。被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。索科克猫适应热带气候，冬天注意保暖。定期体检和驱虫。注意家中安全，这种猫好奇心强，容易走失。
cats.descriptionEn: The Sokoke, also known simply as Sokoke, is a unique cat breed native to the Sokoke Forest in Kenya, Africa, and one of the rarest cat breeds in Africa. This breed was discovered in the 1970s and is believed to be an ancient naturally occurring breed. Sokoke cats are true forest cats, retaining many wild cat characteristics. Due to their rarity, Sokoke cats are listed as an endangered breed and are very rare worldwide.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium to small body, slender and muscular. Short, smooth coat lying close to the body. Unique tawny brown tabby coloring with patterns like tree bark, excellent camouflage. Almond-shaped eyes mostly light green or amber. Large erect ears set high. Slender legs, excellent at climbing.
cats.personalityEn: Independent, active and curious. Retains more wild instincts, highly alert. Enjoys arboreal life, excellent at climbing and jumping. Loyal to owners but needs time to build trust. Intelligent and resourceful, strong adaptability. Active and energetic.
cats.careTipsEn: Needs lots of activity space, preferably cat trees or outdoor access. Short coat easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Sokoke cats adapt to tropical climate, keep warm in winter. Regular checkups and deworming. Pay attention to home safety as this breed is curious and prone to wandering.

cats.name: 缅因猫
cats.description: 缅因猫，又称缅因库恩猫，是北美最古老的自然猫种，也是世界上最大的家猫品种之一。缅因猫起源于美国缅因州，关于它的起源有很多传说，其中最有趣的是说它是猫和浣熊杂交的后代（当然这是不可能的）。缅因猫以其巨大的体型、厚实的被毛和温柔的性格著称，被称为"温柔的巨人"。成年缅因猫体重可达10公斤以上，身长可达1米。
cats.appearance: 体型巨大，身体长而强壮，肌肉发达。拥有长而浓密的双层被毛，可以抵御严寒的新英格兰气候。颈部有华丽的鬃毛，像狮子一样。毛色非常多样，有超过75种颜色和图案。耳朵大而直立，耳尖有丛毛（猞猁耳）。尾巴长而蓬松，像羽毛掸子一样。眼睛大而圆，颜色多样。
cats.personality: 性格极其温柔友善，被称为"温柔的巨人"。对人非常友好，喜欢与人互动。聪明好奇，学习能力强，可以学会各种技巧，甚至会捡东西。虽然体型大，但非常温和，对儿童特别有耐心。适应能力强，与其他宠物也能友好相处。喜欢水，有些个体喜欢玩水。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次，以防打结。缅因猫体型大，需要大的活动空间和大型猫爬架。注意饮食，这种猫食量大，但要避免过度喂食。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康，缅因猫容易有遗传性心脏病。成熟期晚，需要4-5年才能完全长大。
cats.descriptionEn: The Maine Coon, also known as Maine Coon Cat, is the oldest natural breed in North America and one of the largest domestic cat breeds in the world. Maine Coon originated from Maine, with many legends about its origin, the most interesting being that it's a cross between a cat and a raccoon (of course this is impossible). Maine Coons are known for their enormous size, thick coat and gentle temperament, called the "Gentle Giant". Adult Maine Coons can weigh over 10 kg and reach up to 1 meter in length.
cats.appearanceEn: Enormous body, long and strong with muscular development. Has long, thick double coat that can withstand the cold New England climate. Luxurious mane around neck like a lion. Very diverse coat colors, over 75 color and pattern combinations. Large erect ears with ear tufts (lynx-like tips). Long fluffy tail like a feather duster. Large round eyes in various colors.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely gentle and friendly, called the "Gentle Giant". Very friendly to people, enjoys interacting. Intelligent and curious with strong learning ability, can learn various tricks even fetching. Despite large size, very gentle, especially patient with children. Strong adaptability, gets along well with other pets. Some individuals like water and may play with it.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week to prevent matting. Maine Coons are large and need big activity space and large cat trees. Watch diet as they eat a lot but avoid overfeeding. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health as Maine Coons are prone to hereditary heart disease. Matures late, needs 4-5 years to fully grow.

cats.name: 美国短毛猫
cats.description: 美国短毛猫，简称美短，是美国最受欢迎的猫种之一，也是美国的本土代表品种。美短的祖先是英国短毛猫，由五月花号等船只带到北美，用来捕鼠保护粮食。这些猫在北美大陆适应了新环境，逐渐演化成了美国短毛猫。美短以其健康强壮的体质、温和的性格和漂亮的被毛著称，其中银色虎斑（银虎斑）最受欢迎。
cats.appearance: 体型中等偏大，身体强壮，肌肉发达。被毛短而密实，毛绒绒的，有80多种颜色和图案。最著名的是银色虎斑（银虎斑），此外还有棕色虎斑、蓝色、黑色等多种。头部圆而宽，脸颊饱满。眼睛大而圆，颜色通常为金色。
cats.personality: 性格温和、平衡、友好。适应力极强，是最容易饲养的猫种之一。聪明但不过度活跃，既能玩耍也能安静地陪伴。对主人忠诚，与儿童和其他宠物都能友好相处。不太粘人，但也喜欢与人互动。独立性强，能自己打发时间。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。健康强壮，不易生病。美短容易发胖，注意控制饮食，避免过度喂食。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。适应能力强，各种环境都能适应。性格独立，适合上班族饲养。
cats.descriptionEn: The American Shorthair, commonly called American Shorthair, is one of the most popular cat breeds in the United States and the representative native American breed. American Shorthair ancestors are British Shorthairs brought to North America by ships like the Mayflower to catch mice and protect grain. These cats adapted to the new environment and gradually evolved into the American Shorthair. American Shorthairs are known for their healthy and robust constitution, gentle temperament and beautiful coat, with the silver tabby being the most popular.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium to large body, strong and muscular. Short, dense coat that is fluffy with over 80 colors and patterns. Most famous is silver tabby, also available in brown tabby, blue, black and many others. Round wide head with full cheeks. Large round eyes usually in gold.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle, balanced and friendly temperament. Extremely adaptable, one of the easiest breeds to keep. Intelligent but not overly active, can both play and rest quietly. Loyal to owners, gets along well with children and other pets. Not overly clingy but enjoys interaction. Highly independent, can entertain themselves.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Healthy and robust, not prone to illness. American Shorthairs gain weight easily, watch diet and avoid overfeeding. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Highly adaptable to various environments. Independent personality, suitable for working owners.

cats.name: 美国长毛猫
cats.description: 美国长毛猫是美国短毛猫的长毛版本，是在培育美国短毛猫的过程中偶尔出现的长毛个体。美国长毛猫继承了美短健康强壮的体质和温和的性格，同时拥有一身华丽的长毛。这种猫因为数量较少，不如美短有名，但也是非常优秀的家庭宠物。
cats.appearance: 体型中等，身体强壮，与美国短毛猫相似。被毛长而蓬松，柔软浓密。毛色非常多样，与美短相同，有各种颜色和图案。头部圆而宽，脸颊饱满。眼睛大而圆，颜色多样。耳朵中等大小，有长饰毛。尾巴长而蓬松。
cats.personality: 性格温和友善，适应力强。比美国短毛猫稍微粘人一些。对人友好，喜欢陪伴主人。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍但不过度活跃。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次。健康强壮，不容易生病。注意饮食控制，避免肥胖。换毛季节需要增加梳毛频率。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The American Longhair is the long-haired version of the American Shorthair, appearing occasionally during the breeding of American Shorthairs. American Longhairs inherit the healthy and robust constitution and gentle temperament of American Shorthairs while having a luxurious long coat. This breed is less well-known due to smaller numbers but is also an excellent family pet.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium body, sturdy, similar to American Shorthair. Long, fluffy coat that is soft and thick. Very diverse coat colors, same as American Shorthair with various colors and patterns. Round wide head with full cheeks. Large round eyes in various colors. Medium-sized ears with long furnishings. Long fluffy tail.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle and friendly temperament with strong adaptability. Somewhat more clingy than American Shorthair. Friendly to people, enjoys accompanying owners. Gets along well with children and other pets. Intelligent and curious, likes playing but not overly active.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week. Healthy and robust, not prone to illness. Watch diet to avoid obesity. Increase brushing frequency during shedding seasons. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health.

cats.name: 布偶猫
cats.description: 布偶猫，又称布拉多尔猫，是世界上最受欢迎的猫种之一，以其蓝色的眼睛和极其温柔的性格著称。布偶猫是20世纪60年代在美国加州培育出来的，创始人是一位名叫安·贝克的女士。布偶猫的名字来源于它独特的性格——被抱起来时会像布娃娃一样全身放松，非常温顺。布偶猫被称为"猫中之狗"，因为它们像狗一样忠诚亲人。
cats.appearance: 大型猫种，身体长而结实，肌肉发达。被毛半长而蓬松，柔软如丝。毛色为重点色系统，身体颜色浅，脸部、耳朵、四肢和尾巴颜色深。颜色有海豹色、蓝色、巧克力色、丁香色等，还有双色、手套色、重点色等图案。眼睛为深蓝色，大而圆，非常美丽。
cats.personality: 性格极其温柔、安静、友善。被称为"猫中之狗"，对主人非常忠诚。喜欢与人亲近，喜欢被抚摸和拥抱。被抱起时全身放松，像布娃娃一样。对儿童非常有耐心，是理想的家庭宠物。适应室内生活，不喜欢吵闹的环境。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次，但因为是单层毛，比波斯猫容易打理。需要室内饲养，布偶猫性格太温顺，不适合外出。布偶猫体型大，需要足够的活动空间。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康，布偶猫有遗传性疾病风险。注意饮食均衡，避免肥胖。
cats.descriptionEn: The Ragdoll, also known as the布拉多尔猫, is one of the most popular cat breeds in the world, known for its blue eyes and extremely gentle temperament. Ragdolls were developed in California, USA in the 1960s by a woman named Ann Baker. The name comes from their unique temperament - when picked up they go completely limp like a ragdoll, very docile. Ragdolls are called "dog-like cats" because they are as loyal and affectionate as dogs.
cats.appearanceEn: Large cat with long, sturdy body and muscular development. Semi-long fluffy coat that is soft as silk. Colorpoint coat system with light body color and darker face, ears, paws and tail. Colors include seal, blue, chocolate, lilac, also bicolor, mitted, and colorpoint patterns. Deep blue eyes, large and round, very beautiful.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely gentle, quiet and friendly. Called "dog-like cats", very loyal to owners. Enjoys being close to people, likes being petted and hugged. Goes completely limp when picked up, like a ragdoll. Very patient with children, ideal family pet. Adapted to indoor living, doesn't like noisy environments.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week, but easier than Persian due to single coat. Needs indoor living as Ragdolls are too gentle for outdoor life. Large body needs enough activity space. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health as Ragdolls are prone to genetic diseases. Balanced diet, avoid obesity.

cats.name: 褴褛猫
cats.description: 褴褛猫，又称褴褛布偶猫，是布偶猫的近亲品种。褴褛猫的起源与布偶猫密切相关，是从布偶猫繁育项目中分离出来的一支。褴褛猫与布偶猫最大的区别是毛色范围更广，可以有各种颜色和图案，不限于重点色。褴褛猫的性格与布偶猫一样温柔亲人，同样是非常优秀的家庭宠物。
cats.appearance: 大型猫种，体型圆润丰满，肌肉发达。被毛长而蓬松，柔软浓密。毛色非常多样，可以有任何颜色和图案，包括纯色、虎斑、玳瑁等。眼睛大而圆，颜色可以是蓝色、绿色、金色等各种颜色。脸比布偶猫更圆一些。
cats.personality: 性格极其温柔、友善、亲人。与布偶猫性格相似，温和安静。对人非常友好，喜欢被抚摸和拥抱。对儿童特别有耐心。适应能力强，容易饲养。聪明好奇，喜欢与人互动。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，每周2-3次。注意饮食控制，这种猫容易发胖。需要室内饲养。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。褴褛猫成熟期晚，需要4年左右才能完全长大。
cats.descriptionEn: The Ragamuffin, also known as the Ragaputt, is a close relative of the Ragdoll. The Ragamuffin's origin is closely related to the Ragdoll, being a branch separated from the Ragdoll breeding program. The biggest difference between Ragamuffin and Ragdoll is the wider range of coat colors, which can be any color and pattern, not limited to colorpoints. Ragamuffins have the same gentle and affectionate temperament as Ragdolls, also excellent family pets.
cats.appearanceEn: Large cat with rounded and full body, muscular development. Long, fluffy coat that is soft and thick. Very diverse coat colors, can be any color and pattern including solid, tabby, tortoiseshell etc. Large round eyes can be blue, green, gold and various colors. Face is somewhat rounder than Ragdoll.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely gentle, friendly and affectionate. Similar temperament to Ragdoll, gentle and quiet. Very friendly to people, enjoys being petted and hugged. Very patient with children. Strong adaptability, easy to care for. Intelligent and curious, enjoys interacting with people.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed, 2-3 times a week. Watch diet as this breed gains weight easily. Needs indoor living. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Ragamuffins mature late, needing about 4 years to fully grow.

cats.name: 孟买猫
cats.description: 孟买猫是一种独特的猫种，以其纯黑色的被毛和铜色的眼睛著称，看起来像一只小型黑豹。孟买猫是20世纪50年代在美国培育出来的，由缅甸猫和美国短毛猫（黑色）杂交而成。育种者的目标是创造一个像黑豹一样的小型猫种。孟买猫的名字来源于印度的孟买市，因为那里有黑豹。虽然名字叫孟买，但这个品种完全是在美国培育的。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体，纯黑色，像黑色绸缎一样闪闪发光。最独特的是没有一根白毛，全身漆黑。眼睛为铜色或深金色，大而圆，非常迷人。体型中等，肌肉发达，身体结实，比看起来重。头部圆润，脸颊饱满。
cats.personality: 性格友善、活泼、亲人。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人互动。比缅甸猫稍微安静一些，但同样活泼。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍。适应能力强，适合家庭饲养。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可，定期擦拭可增加光泽。注意饮食控制，孟买猫容易发胖。需要足够的互动和玩具。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。黑色被毛在阳光下容易褪色，避免长时间暴晒。
cats.descriptionEn: The Bombay is a unique cat breed known for its pure black coat and copper eyes, looking like a small black panther. Bombay was developed in the USA in the 1950s, crossing Burmese with American Shorthair (black). The breeder's goal was to create a small cat breed that looked like a black panther. The name comes from the Indian city of Mumbai, which is home to black panthers. Although named after Mumbai, this breed was entirely developed in the USA.
cats.appearanceEn: Short, smooth coat lying close to the body, pure black, shining like black satin. Most unique is not a single white hair, entirely black. Eyes are copper or deep gold, large and round, very captivating. Medium body, muscular and sturdy, weighs more than it looks. Round head with full cheeks.
cats.personalityEn: Friendly, active and affectionate. Loyal to owners, enjoys interacting. Somewhat quieter than Burmese but equally active. Intelligent and curious, likes playing. Strong adaptability, suitable for family living. Gets along well with children and other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient, regular wiping can increase shine. Watch diet as Bombay gains weight easily. Needs enough interaction and toys. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Black coat can fade in sunlight, avoid prolonged sun exposure.

cats.name: 塞尔凯克卷毛猫
cats.description: 塞尔凯克卷毛猫是美国培育的卷毛猫品种，以其蓬松的卷曲被毛而著称，看起来像一只泰迪熊。塞尔凯克卷毛猫起源于1987年的美国蒙大拿州，一只流浪猫生下了卷毛的小猫，这就是塞尔凯克卷毛猫的始祖。与其他卷毛猫不同，塞尔凯克卷毛猫的每根毛发都是卷曲的，包括胡须。这种猫的性格也非常温和友善。
cats.appearance: 被毛呈松散的卷曲状，非常蓬松，像泰迪熊一样。有短毛和长毛两个变种。毛色非常多样，可以有任何颜色和图案。体型中等偏胖，身体结实，肌肉发达。头部圆润，脸颊饱满。眼睛大而圆，颜色多样。胡须也是卷曲的。
cats.personality: 性格温和、友善、耐心。对人非常友好，喜欢与人互动。活泼好动，但不过度活跃。适应能力强，容易饲养。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。性格温顺，不容易生气。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，但不要过度梳理，以免损伤卷曲的毛发，每周2次左右即可。塞尔凯克卷毛猫掉毛相对较少。注意饮食控制，这种猫容易发胖。定期体检，注意皮肤和毛发健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Selkirk Rex is a curly-coated cat breed developed in the USA, known for its fluffy curly coat that looks like a teddy bear. Selkirk Rex originated in Montana, USA in 1987 when a stray cat gave birth to a curly-coated kitten - this was the ancestor of the Selkirk Rex. Unlike other curly cats, every hair on the Selkirk Rex is curly, including whiskers. This breed also has a very gentle and friendly temperament.
cats.appearanceEn: Coat is loosely curly, very fluffy, like a teddy bear. Comes in both short and long hair varieties. Very diverse coat colors, can be any color and pattern. Medium-sized, slightly chubby body, sturdy and muscular. Round head with full cheeks. Large round eyes in various colors. Whiskers are also curly.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle, friendly and patient temperament. Very friendly to people, enjoys interacting. Active and playful but not overly energetic. Strong adaptability, easy to care for. Gets along well with children and other pets. Sweet disposition, not prone to getting annoyed.
cats.careTipsEn: Regular brushing needed but not excessive to avoid damaging curls, about twice a week is sufficient. Selkirk Rex sheds relatively little. Watch diet as this breed gains weight easily. Regular checkups, watch skin and coat health.

cats.name: 雪鞋猫
cats.description: 雪鞋猫是一种独特的猫种，以其白色的爪子而闻名，看起来像穿了一双雪鞋。雪鞋猫是20世纪60年代在美国费城诞生的，是暹罗猫和美国短毛猫的杂交后代。雪鞋猫最独特的标志是四只白色的爪子，像穿了白手套和白靴子。雪鞋猫继承了暹罗猫的聪明和活泼，同时也有美短的温和。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体。毛色为重点色，身体颜色浅，脸部、耳朵、尾巴和小腿颜色深。最显著的特征是四爪白色，像穿了雪鞋一样，这是雪鞋猫的标志。眼睛为蓝色，大而呈椭圆形。体型中等，肌肉发达，身体匀称。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、友善、亲人。继承了暹罗猫的聪明和活泼，但相对安静一些。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人互动。好奇好动，喜欢玩耍和探索。适应能力强，容易训练。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 需要足够互动，雪鞋猫喜欢与人相处。被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。雪鞋猫聪明，可以学会各种技巧和指令。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。注意保暖，重点色的猫怕冷。

cats.name: 奥西猫
cats.description: 奥西猫，又称欧西猫，是一种外表像野猫但性格温顺的家猫品种。奥西猫是20世纪60年代在美国培育出来的，由阿比西尼亚猫、暹罗猫和美国短毛猫杂交而成。育种者的目标是创造一个看起来像野猫（如豹猫、虎猫）但性格完全是家猫的品种。奥西猫的名字来源于"豹猫"（Ocelot），因为它们的斑纹很相似。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体，呈豹纹斑点图案，看起来像小型野猫。底色有多种颜色，最经典的是黄褐色底配深褐色斑点。眼睛大，呈杏仁状，颜色多为绿色或金色。体型修长优雅，肌肉发达。耳朵中等大小，直立。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、好奇、友善。虽然看起来狂野，但性格非常温顺。聪明机灵，学习能力强，可以学会各种技巧。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人互动。适应能力强，性格外向。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。奥西猫活泼好动，需要足够的活动空间和玩具。喜欢高处，提供猫爬架等攀爬设施。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。奥西猫社交性强，需要主人的陪伴。

cats.name: 孟加拉豹猫
cats.description: 孟加拉豹猫，简称豹猫，是家猫与亚洲豹猫（野生猫种）的杂交品种，拥有美丽的豹纹外表。孟加拉豹猫是20世纪60年代在美国培育出来的，由遗传学家琼·米尔博士培育。经过多代繁育，孟加拉豹猫已经是温顺的家猫，但保留了野生豹猫的美丽花纹。孟加拉豹猫是目前最受欢迎的猫种之一，以其独特的外表和活泼的性格著称。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而光滑，有独特的豹纹或大理石纹图案，闪闪发光（被称为"金砂"效果）。颜色有棕色、银色、雪色等多种。底色和斑点颜色对比鲜明，非常美丽。体型修长，肌肉发达，充满力量感。眼睛大，呈杏仁状，颜色多为绿色或金色。后腿比前肢稍长。
cats.personality: 性格极其活泼、好奇、精力充沛。非常聪明，学习能力强，可以学会开门、冲水等技能。喜欢水，很多个体喜欢玩水甚至游泳。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人互动。保留了一定的野性本能，警觉性高。需要大量运动和刺激。
cats.careTips: 需要大量活动和互动，不能长时间独处，否则可能出现行为问题。被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。提供足够的玩具和攀爬设施，豹猫精力旺盛。可以提供玩水的机会。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。最好有较大的活动空间。

cats.name: 塞伦盖蒂猫
cats.description: 塞伦盖蒂猫是美国培育的猫种，目标是创造一个看起来像非洲薮猫但没有野生血统的家猫品种。塞伦盖蒂猫是孟加拉豹猫和东方短毛猫的杂交后代，20世纪90年代在美国诞生。这种猫的名字来源于非洲的塞伦盖蒂大草原，因为它们的外表像非洲草原上的野猫。塞伦盖蒂猫完全是家猫，没有野生猫的血统。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而光滑，呈金黄色或银色豹纹图案。体型修长优雅，肌肉发达。耳朵大而直立，位置高，像薮猫一样。眼睛大，呈杏仁状，颜色多为金色或绿色。腿长而有力，适合奔跑。尾巴相对较短。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、好奇、友善。非常聪明，学习能力强。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人互动。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。适应能力强，性格外向。与其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 需要足够活动空间和玩具，塞伦盖蒂猫精力旺盛。被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。提供猫爬架等攀爬设施。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。塞伦盖蒂猫社交性强，需要主人的陪伴。
cats.descriptionEn: The Serengeti is a cat breed developed in the USA with the goal of creating a domestic cat that looks like an African Serval but without wild blood. Serengeti is a hybrid of Bengal and Oriental Shorthair, created in the USA in the 1990s. The breed name comes from Africa's Serengeti savanna because their appearance resembles wild cats of the African plains. Serengeti cats are entirely domestic with no wild cat ancestry.
cats.appearanceEn: Short, smooth coat in golden or silver spotted pattern. Slender and elegant body with well-developed muscles. Large erect ears set high, like a Serval. Large almond-shaped eyes mostly in gold or green. Long powerful legs suitable for running. Relatively short tail.
cats.personalityEn: Active, curious and friendly temperament. Very intelligent with strong learning ability. Loyal to owners, enjoys interacting. Energetic, loves playing and exploring. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality. Gets along well with other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Needs enough activity space and toys as Serengeti are energetic. Short coat easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Provide cat trees and climbing facilities. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Serengeti are social and need owner's companionship.

cats.name: 小精灵矮脚无毛猫
cats.description: 小精灵矮脚无毛猫，简称精灵猫，是一种非常独特的小型无毛猫品种。这种猫是美国培育的，由斯芬克斯猫、芒奇金猫（矮脚猫）和美国卷耳猫杂交而成，结合了三个品种的特征：无毛、短腿和卷耳。小精灵矮脚无毛猫的名字来自精灵（elf）和矮人（dwarf）的结合，非常形象。这种猫非常稀有，价格昂贵。
cats.appearance: 体型极小，是最小的猫种之一。无毛或只有极短的绒毛，皮肤光滑。腿非常短，是矮脚特征。耳朵向后卷曲，是卷耳特征。头部圆润，眼睛大而圆。皮肤有各种颜色和图案。尾巴长而细。
cats.personality: 性格极其活泼、好奇、亲人。非常粘人，喜欢与人亲密接触。聪明机灵，喜欢玩耍。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。适应能力强，性格外向。
cats.careTips: 皮肤需要特别护理，定期洗澡清洁油脂。需要注意防晒和保暖。矮脚猫要注意脊柱和关节健康，避免肥胖。因为体型小，要注意安全，避免被踩到。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。
cats.descriptionEn: The Dwelf is an extremely unique small hairless cat breed. This cat was developed in the USA by crossing Sphynx, Munchkin (short-legged cat) and American Curl, combining three breed traits: hairless, short legs and curled ears. The name Dwelf comes from combining "elf" and "dwarf", very fitting. This cat is very rare and expensive.
cats.appearanceEn: Extremely small body, one of the smallest cat breeds. Hairless or with very short fuzz, smooth skin. Very short legs, the Munchkin trait. Ears curled backwards, the American Curl trait. Round head with large round eyes. Skin in various colors and patterns. Long thin tail.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely active, curious and affectionate. Very clingy, enjoys close contact with people. Intelligent and clever, likes playing. Loyal to owners with rich emotions. Gets along well with children and other pets. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality.
cats.careTipsEn: Skin needs special care, regular baths to clean oils. Needs sun protection and warmth. Short-legged cats need attention for spine and joint health, avoid obesity. Due to small size, pay attention to safety, avoid being stepped on. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health.

cats.name: 精灵无毛猫
cats.description: 精灵无毛猫，又称精灵猫，是美国培育的新品种，由斯芬克斯猫和美国卷耳猫杂交而成。精灵猫结合了斯芬克斯猫的无毛特征和美国卷耳猫的卷耳特征，看起来像神话中的精灵，因此得名。精灵猫是2000年左右出现的新品种，非常稀有。
cats.appearance: 无毛或只有短绒毛，皮肤光滑。耳朵向后卷曲，这是精灵猫最显著的特征。体型中等，肌肉发达。头部呈楔形，眼睛大而呈柠檬形。皮肤可以有各种颜色和图案。尾巴长而细。
cats.personality: 性格极其活泼、好奇、亲人。非常聪明，学习能力强。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人亲密接触。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。适应能力强。
cats.careTips: 皮肤需要特别护理，定期洗澡。需要注意防晒和保暖。卷耳需要特别注意清洁。定期体检，注意皮肤和心脏健康。提供足够的玩具和活动空间。
cats.descriptionEn: The Elf cat is a new breed developed in the USA, crossing the Sphynx with the American Curl. Elf cats combine the hairless trait of the Sphynx with the curled ears of the American Curl, looking like mythological elves, hence the name. Elf cats appeared around 2000 and are a very new and rare breed.
cats.appearanceEn: Hairless or with short fuzz, smooth skin. Ears curled backwards, the most distinctive feature of Elf cats. Medium body, muscular. Wedge-shaped head with large lemon-shaped eyes. Skin can be in various colors and patterns. Long thin tail.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely active, curious and affectionate. Very intelligent with strong learning ability. Loyal to owners, enjoys close contact. Energetic, loves playing and exploring. Gets along well with children and other pets. Strong adaptability.
cats.careTipsEn: Skin needs special care, regular bathing. Needs sun protection and warmth. Curled ears need special attention for cleaning. Regular checkups, watch skin and heart health. Provide enough toys and activity space.

cats.name: 狼猫
cats.description: 狼猫，又称狼人猫，是一种非常独特的猫种，因部分被毛缺失而看起来像狼人（werewolf），因此得名。狼猫是2010年在美国发现的，是自然基因突变的结果。这种猫的被毛呈斑块状分布，脸上、眼睛周围、鼻子和嘴部没有毛，身体其他部位也有脱毛区域，看起来像传说中的狼人。虽然外表奇特，但狼猫的性格非常友好。
cats.appearance: 被毛呈独特的斑块状分布，像狼人。部分区域无毛或只有稀疏的毛发，脸上和鼻子周围通常无毛。身体其他部位的毛发也不均匀。毛色通常为黑色或深灰色。眼睛大而呈圆形，颜色通常为黄色或金色。体型中等，肌肉发达。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、好奇、忠诚。对人友好，喜欢与人互动。虽然外表像野兽，但性格非常温顺。聪明机灵，学习能力强。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。适应能力强。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要特别护理，定期检查皮肤状况。因为被毛少，狼猫怕冷，冬天要注意保暖。皮肤敏感，需要注意防晒。定期体检，注意皮肤和心脏健康。狼猫容易出现皮肤问题，需要特别关注。
cats.descriptionEn: The Lykoi, also known as the Werewolf Cat, is a very unique cat breed that looks like a werewolf due to partial hair loss, hence the name. Lykoi was discovered in the USA in 2010 as a result of natural genetic mutation. This cat's coat is distributed in patches, with no hair on the face, around the eyes, nose and mouth, and sparse hair on other body areas, looking like a legendary werewolf. Although appearing unusual, Lykoi cats have very friendly personalities.
cats.appearanceEn: Coat distributed in unique patches like a werewolf. Some areas hairless or with sparse hair, face and nose area usually hairless. Hair distribution is uneven on other body parts. Coat color usually black or dark gray. Large round eyes usually yellow or gold. Medium body, muscular.
cats.personalityEn: Active, curious and loyal. Friendly to people, enjoys interacting. Although looking like a beast, very gentle temperament. Intelligent and clever with strong learning ability. Loyal to owners with rich emotions. Strong adaptability.
cats.careTipsEn: Coat needs special care, regular skin condition checks. Because of sparse hair, Lykoi are sensitive to cold, keep warm in winter. Sensitive skin needs sun protection. Regular checkups, watch skin and heart health. Lykoi are prone to skin problems needing special attention.

cats.name: 皮克斯波猫
cats.description: 皮克斯波猫，又称短尾山猫，是美国培育的猫种，外表像短尾野猫（美洲山猫）。皮克斯波猫的起源有一个传说：一只家猫与野生的美洲短尾猫交配，生下了皮克斯波猫。不过DNA检测表明皮克斯波猫完全是家猫，没有野生血统。皮克斯波猫的名字来源于"小精灵短尾"（Pixie Bobtail），因为它们的尾巴很短。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而密实，呈斑点状或虎斑状，通常为棕色或灰褐色，类似山猫的颜色。体型中等偏大，身体结实，肌肉发达。最显著的特征是短尾巴，长度不一，从无尾到中等长度都有。耳朵有耳尖丛毛（猞猁耳），像山猫一样。眼睛颜色通常为金色或绿褐色。
cats.personality: 性格友善、聪明、忠诚。虽然外表像野猫，但性格非常温顺。对主人忠诚，喜欢与人互动。聪明好学，可以学会捡东西等技能。适应能力强，容易饲养。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。皮克斯波猫活泼，需要足够的活动空间。提供玩具和攀爬设施。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。注意饮食控制，避免肥胖。
cats.descriptionEn: The Pixiebob, also known as the Short-tailed Bobcat, is a cat breed developed in the USA that resembles the wild bobcat. There's a legend about the Pixiebob's origin: a domestic cat mated with a wild bobcat and produced the Pixiebob. However, DNA testing shows Pixiebobs are entirely domestic cats with no wild ancestry. The breed name comes from "Pixie Bobtail" because of their short tails.
cats.appearanceEn: Short, dense coat in spotted or tabby pattern, usually brown or gray-brown, similar to bobcat coloring. Medium to large body, sturdy and muscular. Most distinctive feature is short tail of varying length, from tailless to medium. Ears with ear tufts (lynx-like), like a bobcat. Eye color usually gold or greenish-brown.
cats.personalityEn: Friendly, intelligent and loyal. Although appearing like a wild cat, very gentle temperament. Loyal to owners, enjoys interacting. Intelligent and eager to learn, can learn to fetch and other tricks. Strong adaptability, easy to care for. Gets along well with children and other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Pixiebob are active and need enough activity space. Provide toys and climbing facilities. Regular checkups, watch heart and kidney health. Watch diet to avoid obesity.

cats.name: 玩具虎猫
cats.description: 玩具虎猫，简称虎猫，是美国培育的猫种，目标是创造一个看起来像小老虎的家猫。玩具虎猫是孟加拉豹猫和条纹家猫的杂交后代，20世纪80年代开始培育。育种者朱迪·萨格登（她的母亲就是培育孟加拉豹猫的琼·米尔博士）想要创造一个像老虎的家猫品种。玩具虎猫拥有老虎一样的条纹图案，但体型是普通家猫大小。
cats.appearance: 被毛短而光滑，呈橙色和黑色条纹虎纹，与老虎的花纹相似。底色为金黄色或橙色，有深色的垂直条纹。身体修长，肌肉发达。眼睛小而圆，颜色通常为金色。耳朵小而圆，位置较低。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、好奇、友善。非常聪明，学习能力强。对人友好，喜欢与人互动。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。适应能力强，性格外向。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 需要足够活动空间和玩具。被毛短易打理，每周梳毛一次即可。玩具虎猫聪明，可以学习各种技巧。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。提供攀爬设施和互动玩具。

cats.name: 美国拉邦卷毛猫
cats.description: 美国拉邦卷毛猫是拉邦卷毛猫的美国变种，以其独特的卷曲被毛而著称。拉邦卷毛猫起源于1982年美国俄勒冈州的一个农场，是自然基因突变的结果。这种猫的被毛呈松散的波浪状，非常柔软，摸起来像羊羔绒一样。拉邦卷毛猫的名字是因为它的被毛看起来是"永久烫过的"。
cats.appearance: 被毛呈松散的卷曲状，长短不一，非常柔软蓬松。有短毛和长毛两个变种。毛色极其多样，可以有任何颜色和图案。体型中等，身体匀称。头部略呈楔形，耳朵大而直立。眼睛大，呈杏仁状，颜色多样。
cats.personality: 性格温和、友善、亲人。喜欢与人互动，对主人忠诚。适应力强，能适应各种家庭环境。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。活泼但不过度好动。
cats.careTips: 被毛需要定期梳理，但不需要过度护理，每周2次左右即可。拉邦卷毛猫掉毛少，适合对猫毛敏感的人。定期体检，注意皮肤和毛发健康。注意饮食均衡，保持适当体重。

cats.name: 斯芬克斯猫
cats.description: 斯芬克斯猫，又称加拿大无毛猫，是世界上最著名的无毛猫品种。斯芬克斯猫起源于1966年的加拿大安大略省，一只家猫生下了一只无毛的小猫，这就是斯芬克斯猫的始祖。虽然看起来完全无毛，但斯芬克斯猫其实有一层非常短的绒毛，摸起来像桃子皮一样。斯芬克斯猫性格极其温顺亲人，被称为"最像狗的猫"。
cats.appearance: 最显著特征是无毛，但其实有一层极短柔软的绒毛，像麂皮一样。皮肤有各种颜色和图案，其实是皮肤色素呈现的。皮肤有很多褶皱，尤其是额头、脖子和腿部。眼睛大而呈柠檬形，颜色多样。耳朵非常大而直立，位置较低。体型中等，肌肉发达，肚子圆润。
cats.personality: 极其热情、活泼、亲人。非常粘人，喜欢与人亲密接触，会钻被窝取暖。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍和探索。性格外向，不怕陌生人。与儿童和其他宠物相处非常好。
cats.careTips: 需要定期洗澡清洁皮肤油脂，通常每周一次，否则皮肤会油腻。皮肤敏感，需要防晒，避免长时间阳光直射。冬季需要保暖，可以穿衣服，因为没有毛保暖。定期清洁耳朵和指甲，因为没有耳毛保护，容易积垢。斯芬克斯猫体温高，新陈代谢快，需要更多的食物。

cats.name: 巴比诺矮脚无毛猫
cats.description: 巴比诺矮脚无毛猫，简称巴比诺猫，是斯芬克斯猫和芒奇金猫（矮脚猫）的杂交品种，结合了无毛和短腿两个特征。巴比诺猫是2005年在美国培育出来的，名字在意大利语中意为"婴儿"，因为它们看起来像永远长不大的小猫。巴比诺猫非常稀有，属于新品种。
cats.appearance: 体型小，腿非常短，是矮脚特征。无毛或只有短绒毛，皮肤光滑。头部呈楔形，耳朵大而直立。眼睛大，呈柠檬形，颜色多样。皮肤可以有各种颜色和图案。尾巴长而细。
cats.personality: 性格极其活泼、好奇、亲人。非常粘人，喜欢与人互动。虽然腿短，但非常灵活，能跑能跳。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。聪明机灵，学习能力强。适应能力强，性格外向。
cats.careTips: 皮肤需要特别护理，定期洗澡。需要注意防晒和保暖。矮脚猫要注意脊柱健康，避免肥胖和高处跳下。因为腿短，要注意饮食控制，避免发胖。定期体检，注意心脏和脊柱健康。

cats.name: 加拿大无毛长毛猫
cats.description: 加拿大无毛长毛猫是斯芬克斯猫的长毛变种，也被称为长毛斯芬克斯。这种猫的被毛比普通斯芬克斯猫长一些，但仍然很短，呈天鹅绒般的质感。加拿大无毛长毛猫与斯芬克斯猫性格相同，都非常温顺亲人。这个品种相对稀有，不如普通斯芬克斯猫常见。
cats.appearance: 被毛极短或无毛，但比斯芬克斯猫稍微长一点，有绒面质感。皮肤有各种颜色和图案。体型中等，肌肉发达，与斯芬克斯猫相似。耳朵大而直立。眼睛大，呈柠檬形。
cats.personality: 性格极其热情、活泼、亲人。非常粘人，喜欢与人亲密接触。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍。适应能力强，性格外向。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 皮肤需要特别护理，定期洗澡。需要注意防晒和保暖。被毛比斯芬克斯猫稍微长一点，但仍然容易打理。定期清洁耳朵和指甲。注意饮食，斯芬克斯类的猫新陈代谢快，需要更多食物。
cats.descriptionEn: The Canadian Hairless is a long-haired variant of the Sphynx, also known as the Long-haired Sphynx. This cat's coat is slightly longer than regular Sphynx but still very short, with a velvety texture. Canadian Hairless cats have the same temperament as Sphynx, being very warm and affectionate. This breed is relatively rare, not as common as regular Sphynx.
cats.appearanceEn: Extremely short or hairless coat but slightly longer than Sphynx, with a chamois-like texture. Skin in various colors and patterns. Medium body, muscular, similar to Sphynx. Large erect ears. Large lemon-shaped eyes.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely enthusiastic, active and affectionate. Very clingy, enjoys close contact with people. Loyal to owners with rich emotions. Intelligent and curious, likes playing. Strong adaptability, outgoing personality. Gets along well with children and other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Skin needs special care, regular bathing. Needs sun protection and warmth. Coat slightly longer than Sphynx but still easy to groom. Regular ear and nail cleaning. Watch diet as Sphynx-type cats have fast metabolism and need more food.

cats.name: 墨西哥无毛猫
cats.description: 墨西哥无毛猫是古老的墨西哥本土品种，据称已有上千年历史。在阿兹特克文明时期，无毛猫就已经存在，被阿兹特克人视为神圣的动物。墨西哥无毛猫是世界上最古老的无毛猫品种之一，比加拿大斯芬克斯猫早得多。这种猫在墨西哥文化中占有重要地位，被认为具有治疗作用。
cats.appearance: 无毛或只有极短绒毛，皮肤光滑温热。体型中等，身体修长，肌肉发达。头部呈楔形，耳朵大而直立。眼睛呈杏仁状，颜色多样。皮肤颜色多样，从灰色到黑色都有。四肢修长，尾巴长。
cats.personality: 性格友善、活泼、忠诚。对人友好，喜欢与人亲密接触。聪明好奇，喜欢玩耍和探索。适应能力强，能适应各种环境。对主人忠诚，感情丰富。
cats.careTips: 皮肤需要特别护理，定期洗澡清洁油脂。需要注意防晒和保暖。墨西哥无毛猫适应温暖气候，冬天要注意保暖。定期体检，注意皮肤健康。提供足够的活动空间和玩具。
cats.descriptionEn: The Mexican Hairless is an ancient native Mexican breed, said to have a history of thousands of years. Hairless cats existed during the Aztec civilization and were regarded as sacred animals by the Aztecs. Mexican Hairless is one of the oldest hairless cat breeds in the world, much older than the Canadian Sphynx. This cat holds an important place in Mexican culture and is believed to have healing properties.
cats.appearanceEn: Hairless or with very short fuzz, smooth and warm skin. Medium body, slender and muscular. Wedge-shaped head with large erect ears. Almond-shaped eyes in various colors. Diverse skin colors from gray to black. Slender legs, long tail.
cats.personalityEn: Friendly, active and loyal. Friendly to people, enjoys close contact. Intelligent and curious, likes playing and exploring. Strong adaptability to various environments. Loyal to owners with rich emotions.
cats.careTipsEn: Skin needs special care, regular baths to clean oils. Needs sun protection and warmth. Mexican Hairless adapts to warm climates, keep warm in winter. Regular checkups, watch skin health. Provide enough activity space and toys.

cats.name: 巴西短毛猫
cats.description: 巴西短毛猫是南美洲最著名的猫种，也是巴西的本土代表品种。巴西短毛猫是由巴西街头的流浪猫经过选择性培育而成的，这些猫在巴西生活了几百年，适应了当地的气候和环境。巴西短毛猫体质非常健康，寿命长，是理想的家庭宠物。这种猫在巴西非常受欢迎，是巴西最常见的家猫品种。
cats.appearance: 体型中等，肌肉发达，身体匀称。被毛短而光滑，紧贴身体，有光泽。毛色非常多样，有各种颜色和图案。眼睛大而圆，颜色多样。耳朵中等大小，直立。四肢强壮有力。
cats.personality: 性格活泼、好奇、友好。对人友善，喜欢与人互动。聪明机灵，适应能力强。容易训练，学习能力强。与儿童和其他宠物相处融洽。精力充沛，喜欢玩耍和探索。
cats.careTips: 被毛打理极其简单，每周梳毛一次即可。体质好，不容易生病。适应热带气候，耐热性强。定期体检和驱虫。注意饮食均衡，保持适当体重。提供足够的活动空间和玩具。
cats.descriptionEn: The Brazilian Shorthair is the most famous cat breed in South America and the representative native breed of Brazil. Brazilian Shorthairs were developed through selective breeding from stray cats on Brazilian streets, these cats have lived in Brazil for hundreds of years adapting to the local climate and environment. Brazilian Shorthairs are very healthy with long lifespans, ideal family pets. This breed is very popular in Brazil and is the most common house cat breed in Brazil.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium body, muscular and well-proportioned. Short, smooth coat lying close to the body with a sheen. Very diverse coat colors in various colors and patterns. Large round eyes in various colors. Medium-sized erect ears. Strong legs with good strength.
cats.personalityEn: Active, curious and friendly. Friendly to people, enjoys interacting. Intelligent and resourceful, strong adaptability. Easy to train with strong learning ability. Gets along well with children and other pets. Energetic, loves playing and exploring.
cats.careTipsEn: Extremely easy to groom, brushing once a week is sufficient. Good health, not prone to illness. Adapted to tropical climate with strong heat tolerance. Regular checkups and deworming. Balanced diet, maintain proper weight. Provide enough activity space and toys.

cats.name: 澳大利亚雾猫
cats.description: 澳大利亚雾猫，又称澳洲雾猫，是澳大利亚本土培育的第一个猫种，也是澳大利亚的国宝级猫种。澳大利亚雾猫是20世纪70年代由澳大利亚医生翠西·斯特拉达博士培育的，由缅甸猫、阿比西尼亚猫和澳大利亚本土家猫杂交而成。这种猫最独特的是它的被毛，呈独特的"雾状"花纹，看起来像笼罩在一层薄雾中，因此得名。
cats.appearance: 体型中等，身体匀称，肌肉发达。被毛短而密实，呈独特的雾状花纹（斑点或大理石纹被一层薄雾笼罩）。最经典的颜色是棕色雾斑，还有蓝色、巧克力色等。眼睛大而圆，呈绿色或黄绿色，非常美丽。脸型圆润，表情甜美。
cats.personality: 性格极其温柔、友好、耐心。对人非常友善，喜欢与人亲近。温和安静，但也喜欢玩耍。适应能力强，非常适合家庭饲养。对儿童特别有耐心，是理想的家庭宠物。与其他宠物相处融洽。
cats.careTips: 被毛打理简单，每周梳毛一次即可。澳大利亚雾猫性格温和，适合室内饲养。定期体检，注意牙齿和肾脏健康。注意饮食控制，避免肥胖。提供适当的玩具和互动时间。
cats.descriptionEn: The Australian Mist, also known as the Aussie Mist, is the first cat breed developed in Australia and is a national treasure of Australia. Australian Mist was developed in the 1970s by Australian Dr. Truda Straeda, crossing Burmese, Abyssinian and Australian native house cats. The most unique feature of this cat is its coat with a unique "misted" pattern, looking like it's shrouded in a layer of mist, hence the name.
cats.appearanceEn: Medium body, well-proportioned with muscular development. Short, dense coat with unique misted pattern (spots or marble pattern shrouded in a layer of mist). Most classic color is brown misted, also available in blue, chocolate and others. Large round eyes in green or yellow-green, very beautiful. Round face with a sweet expression.
cats.personalityEn: Extremely gentle, friendly and patient. Very friendly to people, enjoys being close to others. Gentle and quiet but also likes playing. Strong adaptability, very suitable for family living. Especially patient with children, ideal family pet. Gets along well with other pets.
cats.careTipsEn: Simple grooming, brushing once a week is sufficient. Australian Mist has gentle temperament, suitable for indoor living. Regular checkups, watch dental and kidney health. Watch diet to avoid obesity. Provide appropriate toys and interaction time.

cats.name: 银渐层
cats.description: 银渐层，又称英国短毛猫银渐层，是英国短毛猫中最受欢迎的毛色品种之一，以其银白色的渐变被毛著称。银渐层的被毛底层为白色，毛尖为黑色或灰色，形成独特的渐变效果，看起来像撒了一层银粉。银渐层继承了英国短毛猫圆胖可爱的外表和温和的性格，是目前最受欢迎的宠物猫之一，尤其在亚洲地区非常流行。
cats.appearance: 体型圆胖，身材矮壮，肌肉发达，与英国短毛猫相同。被毛短而密实，毛绒绒的。最独特的是毛色——底层绒毛为纯白色，毛尖约1/3为黑色或深灰色，形成独特的银色渐变效果，在光线下闪闪发光。脸型圆而大，脸颊饱满，腮帮子发达。眼睛大而圆，通常为黄绿色或绿色，像两颗绿宝石。鼻子短，呈砖红色。耳朵小而圆，位置较低。
cats.personality: 性格温顺、安静、友善，非常亲人。适应能力强，容易相处。比普通英短稍微活泼一些，但仍然很安静。对主人忠诚，喜欢陪伴在主人身边。对儿童非常有耐心，是理想的家庭宠物。与其他宠物也能友好相处。不太爱叫，叫声轻柔。
cats.careTips: 被毛容易打理，每周梳毛一次即可，换毛季增加频率。银渐层容易发胖，注意控制饮食，避免过度喂食。不需要大量运动，但也要有适当的活动空间。定期体检，注意心脏和肾脏健康。银渐层容易有泪痕，注意眼部清洁。提供猫爬架供其攀爬和休息。
cats.descriptionEn: The Silver Shaded British Shorthair, commonly known as Silver Shaded, is one of the most popular color varieties of the British Shorthair, renowned for its silver-gradient coat. The Silver Shorthair has white undercoat with black or gray hair tips, creating a unique gradient effect that looks like it's dusted with silver powder. It inherits the round, cute appearance and gentle temperament of the British Shorthair, making it one of the most popular pet cats, especially in Asian regions.
cats.appearanceEn: Round and chubby body, stocky build with well-developed muscles, same as British Shorthair. Short and dense coat, fluffy. The most distinctive feature is the coat color - white undercoat with about 1/3 of the hair tips in black or dark gray, creating a unique silver gradient effect that sparkles in light. Large round face with full cheeks and well-developed jowls. Large round eyes, usually yellow-green or green, like two emeralds. Short nose in brick red color. Small round ears set low.
cats.personalityEn: Gentle, quiet and friendly, very affectionate to people. Highly adaptable and easy to get along with. Slightly more active than regular British Shorthairs but still quite calm. Loyal to owners, likes to accompany them. Very patient with children, ideal family pet. Gets along well with other pets. Not very vocal, has a soft voice.
cats.careTipsEn: Easy coat maintenance, brushing once a week is sufficient, increase frequency during shedding season. Silver Shaded cats tend to gain weight easily, watch diet carefully and avoid overfeeding. Doesn't require much exercise but needs appropriate activity space. Regular checkups, watch for heart and kidney health. Prone to tear stains, pay attention to eye cleaning. Provide cat trees for climbing and resting.
